authors_text: Ali Shirali
title: Sequential Nature of Recommender Systems Disrupts the Evaluation Process
title_zh: 推荐系统的顺序性质扰乱了评估过程
comment: To Appear in Third International Workshop on Algorithmic Bias in Search and Recommendation (Bias 2022)
comments: To Appear in Third International Workshop on Algorithmic Bias in Search and Recommendation (Bias 2022)
abstract: Datasets are often generated in a sequential manner, where the previous samples and intermediate decisions or interventions affect subsequent samples. This is especially prominent in cases where there are significant human-AI interactions, such as in recommender systems. To characterize the importance of this relationship across samples, we propose to use adversarial attacks on popular evaluation processes. We present sequence-aware boosting attacks and provide a lower bound on the amount of extra information that can be exploited from a confidential test set solely based on the order of the observed data. We use real and synthetic data to test our methods and show that the evaluation process on the MovieLense-100k dataset can be affected by $\sim1\%$ which is important when considering the close competition. Codes are publicly available.
summary: Datasets are often generated in a sequential manner, where the previous samples and intermediate decisions or interventions affect subsequent samples. This is especially prominent in cases where there are significant human-AI interactions, such as in recommender systems. To characterize the importance of this relationship across samples, we propose to use adversarial attacks on popular evaluation processes. We present sequence-aware boosting attacks and provide a lower bound on the amount of extra information that can be exploited from a confidential test set solely based on the order of the observed data. We use real and synthetic data to test our methods and show that the evaluation process on the MovieLense-100k dataset can be affected by $\sim1\%$ which is important when considering the close competition. Codes are publicly available.
abstract_zh: 数据集通常以顺序方式生成，其中先前的样本和中间决策或干预影响后续样本。在存在大量人机交互的情况下（例如在推荐系统中），这一点尤其突出。为了表征样本之间这种关系的重要性，我们建议对流行的评估过程使用对抗性攻击。我们提出了序列感知增强攻击，并提供了仅根据观察到的数据的顺序从机密测试集中可利用的额外信息量的下限。我们使用真实和合成数据来测试我们的方法，并表明 MovieLense-100k 数据集上的评估过程可能会受到 $\sim1\%$ 的影响，这在考虑激烈的竞争时很重要。代码是公开的。

AI.tldr: 本文研究推荐系统中数据序列性对评估过程的影响，提出通过对抗攻击量化序列特性对评估结果的干扰程度。
AI.motivation: 推荐系统中的用户交互数据具有强时序依赖性，但现有评估方法未充分考虑序列性导致的评估偏差，可能影响模型公平性与竞争性。
AI.method: 设计序列感知的增强攻击方法，通过分析数据观测顺序推断保密测试集信息，并建立信息量下界理论分析框架。
AI.result: 实验表明MovieLense-100k数据集的评估指标可被序列攻击扰动约1%，验证了序列性对评估过程的显著影响。
AI.conclusion: 推荐系统的序列特性会破坏传统评估方法的可靠性，需开发新的评估范式以应对时序依赖带来的挑战。

search_text: Sequential Nature of Recommender Systems Disrupts the Evaluation Process 推荐系统的顺序性质扰乱了评估过程 Datasets are often generated in a sequential manner, where the previous samples and intermediate decisions or interventions affect subsequent samples. This is especially prominent in cases where there are significant human-AI interactions, such as in recommender systems. To characterize the importance of this relationship across samples, we propose to use adversarial attacks on popular evaluation processes. We present sequence-aware boosting attacks and provide a lower bound on the amount of extra information that can be exploited from a confidential test set solely based on the order of the observed data. We use real and synthetic data to test our methods and show that the evaluation process on the MovieLense-100k dataset can be affected by $\sim1\%$ which is important when considering the close competition. Codes are publicly available. 数据集通常以顺序方式生成，其中先前的样本和中间决策或干预影响后续样本。在存在大量人机交互的情况下（例如在推荐系统中），这一点尤其突出。为了表征样本之间这种关系的重要性，我们建议对流行的评估过程使用对抗性攻击。我们提出了序列感知增强攻击，并提供了仅根据观察到的数据的顺序从机密测试集中可利用的额外信息量的下限。我们使用真实和合成数据来测试我们的方法，并表明 MovieLense-100k 数据集上的评估过程可能会受到 $\sim1\%$ 的影响，这在考虑激烈的竞争时很重要。代码是公开的。 本文研究推荐系统中数据序列性对评估过程的影响，提出通过对抗攻击量化序列特性对评估结果的干扰程度。 Ali Shirali cs.IR,cs.AI

authors_text: Gilad Cohen,Raja Giryes
title: Membership Inference Attack Using Self Influence Functions
title_zh: 使用自我影响函数的成员推理攻击
abstract: Member inference (MI) attacks aim to determine if a specific data sample was used to train a machine learning model. Thus, MI is a major privacy threat to models trained on private sensitive data, such as medical records. In MI attacks one may consider the black-box settings, where the model's parameters and activations are hidden from the adversary, or the white-box case where they are available to the attacker. In this work, we focus on the latter and present a novel MI attack for it that employs influence functions, or more specifically the samples' self-influence scores, to perform the MI prediction. We evaluate our attack on CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and Tiny ImageNet datasets, using versatile architectures such as AlexNet, ResNet, and DenseNet. Our attack method achieves new state-of-the-art results for both training with and without data augmentations. Code is available at https://github.com/giladcohen/sif_mi_attack.
summary: Member inference (MI) attacks aim to determine if a specific data sample was used to train a machine learning model. Thus, MI is a major privacy threat to models trained on private sensitive data, such as medical records. In MI attacks one may consider the black-box settings, where the model's parameters and activations are hidden from the adversary, or the white-box case where they are available to the attacker. In this work, we focus on the latter and present a novel MI attack for it that employs influence functions, or more specifically the samples' self-influence scores, to perform the MI prediction. We evaluate our attack on CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and Tiny ImageNet datasets, using versatile architectures such as AlexNet, ResNet, and DenseNet. Our attack method achieves new state-of-the-art results for both training with and without data augmentations. Code is available at https://github.com/giladcohen/sif_mi_attack.
abstract_zh: 成员推理 (MI) 攻击旨在确定特定数据样本是否用于训练机器学习模型。因此，对于使用私人敏感数据（例如医疗记录）训练的模型来说，MI 是一个主要的隐私威胁。在 MI 攻击中，人们可以考虑黑盒设置，其中模型的参数和激活对对手隐藏，或者白盒情况，攻击者可以使用它们。在这项工作中，我们重点关注后者，并为其提出了一种新颖的 MI 攻击，该攻击利用影响函数，或更具体地说是样本的自我影响分数来执行 MI 预测。我们使用 AlexNet、ResNet 和 DenseNet 等通用架构评估对 CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100 和 Tiny ImageNet 数据集的攻击。我们的攻击方法在有数据增强和没有数据增强的情况下都取得了最先进的结果。代码可在 https://github.com/giladcohen/sif_mi_attack 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自影响函数的新型成员推理攻击方法，用于判断特定数据样本是否参与了机器学习模型的训练。
AI.motivation: 成员推理攻击威胁到使用私有敏感数据（如医疗记录）训练的模型隐私。现有方法在白盒场景下效果有限，尤其在数据增强存在时表现不佳，需更有效的攻击手段。
AI.method: 利用影响函数中的样本自影响分数，通过分析模型参数变化来推断样本是否属于训练集，适用于白盒攻击场景。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100和Tiny ImageNet数据集上，使用AlexNet、ResNet和DenseNet等架构验证，攻击效果达到新SOTA，支持有无数据增强两种训练方式。
AI.conclusion: 自影响函数方法有效提升了成员推理攻击性能，揭示了模型参数变化与训练数据关联性，为隐私保护研究提供了新视角。

authors_text: Andre Xian Ming Chang,Parth Khopkar,Bashar Romanous,Abhishek Chaurasia,Patrick Estep,Skyler Windh,Doug Vanesko,Sheik Dawood Beer Mohideen,Eugenio Culurciello
title: Reinforcement Learning Approach for Mapping Applications to Dataflow-Based Coarse-Grained Reconfigurable Array
title_zh: 将应用程序映射到基于数据流的粗粒度可重构阵列的强化学习方法
abstract: The Streaming Engine (SE) is a Coarse-Grained Reconfigurable Array which provides programming flexibility and high-performance with energy efficiency. An application program to be executed on the SE is represented as a combination of Synchronous Data Flow (SDF) graphs, where every instruction is represented as a node. Each node needs to be mapped to the right slot and array in the SE to ensure the correct execution of the program. This creates an optimization problem with a vast and sparse search space for which finding a mapping manually is impractical because it requires expertise and knowledge of the SE micro-architecture. In this work we propose a Reinforcement Learning framework with Global Graph Attention (GGA) module and output masking of invalid placements to find and optimize instruction schedules. We use Proximal Policy Optimization in order to train a model which places operations into the SE tiles based on a reward function that models the SE device and its constraints. The GGA module consists of a graph neural network and an attention module. The graph neural network creates embeddings of the SDFs and the attention block is used to model sequential operation placement. We show results on how certain workloads are mapped to the SE and the factors affecting mapping quality. We find that the addition of GGA, on average, finds 10% better instruction schedules in terms of total clock cycles taken and masking improves reward obtained by 20%.
summary: The Streaming Engine (SE) is a Coarse-Grained Reconfigurable Array which provides programming flexibility and high-performance with energy efficiency. An application program to be executed on the SE is represented as a combination of Synchronous Data Flow (SDF) graphs, where every instruction is represented as a node. Each node needs to be mapped to the right slot and array in the SE to ensure the correct execution of the program. This creates an optimization problem with a vast and sparse search space for which finding a mapping manually is impractical because it requires expertise and knowledge of the SE micro-architecture. In this work we propose a Reinforcement Learning framework with Global Graph Attention (GGA) module and output masking of invalid placements to find and optimize instruction schedules. We use Proximal Policy Optimization in order to train a model which places operations into the SE tiles based on a reward function that models the SE device and its constraints. The GGA module consists of a graph neural network and an attention module. The graph neural network creates embeddings of the SDFs and the attention block is used to model sequential operation placement. We show results on how certain workloads are mapped to the SE and the factors affecting mapping quality. We find that the addition of GGA, on average, finds 10% better instruction schedules in terms of total clock cycles taken and masking improves reward obtained by 20%.
abstract_zh: 流引擎 (SE) 是一种粗粒度可重构阵列，可提供编程灵活性、高性能和能效。在SE上执行的应用程序被表示为同步数据流（SDF）图的组合，其中每条指令被表示为一个节点。每个节点都需要映射到SE中正确的槽和数组，以保证程序的正确执行。这会产生一个具有巨大且稀疏搜索空间的优化问题，手动查找映射是不切实际的，因为它需要 SE 微架构的专业知识和知识。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个强化学习框架，具有全局图注意（GGA）模块和无效布局的输出屏蔽，以查找和优化指令调度。我们使用近端策略优化来训练一个模型，该模型根据对 SE 设备及其约束进行建模的奖励函数将操作放入 SE 块中。 GGA模块由图神经网络和注意力模块组成。图神经网络创建 SDF 的嵌入，并且注意力块用于对顺序操作放置进行建模。我们展示了如何将某些工作负载映射到 SE 以及影响映射质量的因素的结果。我们发现，平均而言，添加 GGA 可以使指令调度在所用的总时钟周期方面提高 10%，并且屏蔽可以将获得的奖励提高 20%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于强化学习的方法，用于将同步数据流（SDF）图映射到数据流架构的粗粒度可重构阵列（SE）中，以优化指令调度。
AI.motivation: 手动映射SDF图到SE的资源需专业知识且效率低下，而传统方法难以处理大规模搜索空间，因此需要自动化优化方案。
AI.method: 设计包含全局图注意力模块（GGA）和无效位置掩码的强化学习框架，结合图神经网络与注意力机制建模操作序列，并通过近端策略优化（PPO）训练模型。
AI.result: 实验表明，GGA模块使指令调度的总时钟周期平均减少10%，而掩码机制使奖励提升20%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过强化学习有效解决了SE资源映射的优化问题，显著提升了映射质量与能效。

motivation: 手动映射SDF图到SE的资源需专业知识且效率低下，而传统方法难以处理大规模搜索空间，因此需要自动化优化方案。
method: 设计包含全局图注意力模块（GGA）和无效位置掩码的强化学习框架，结合图神经网络与注意力机制建模操作序列，并通过近端策略优化（PPO）训练模型。
result: 实验表明，GGA模块使指令调度的总时钟周期平均减少10%，而掩码机制使奖励提升20%。
conclusion: 该方法通过强化学习有效解决了SE资源映射的优化问题，显著提升了映射质量与能效。
search_text: Reinforcement Learning Approach for Mapping Applications to Dataflow-Based Coarse-Grained Reconfigurable Array 将应用程序映射到基于数据流的粗粒度可重构阵列的强化学习方法 The Streaming Engine (SE) is a Coarse-Grained Reconfigurable Array which provides programming flexibility and high-performance with energy efficiency. An application program to be executed on the SE is represented as a combination of Synchronous Data Flow (SDF) graphs, where every instruction is represented as a node. Each node needs to be mapped to the right slot and array in the SE to ensure the correct execution of the program. This creates an optimization problem with a vast and sparse search space for which finding a mapping manually is impractical because it requires expertise and knowledge of the SE micro-architecture. In this work we propose a Reinforcement Learning framework with Global Graph Attention (GGA) module and output masking of invalid placements to find and optimize instruction schedules. We use Proximal Policy Optimization in order to train a model which places operations into the SE tiles based on a reward function that models the SE device and its constraints. The GGA module consists of a graph neural network and an attention module. The graph neural network creates embeddings of the SDFs and the attention block is used to model sequential operation placement. We show results on how certain workloads are mapped to the SE and the factors affecting mapping quality. We find that the addition of GGA, on average, finds 10% better instruction schedules in terms of total clock cycles taken and masking improves reward obtained by 20%. 流引擎 (SE) 是一种粗粒度可重构阵列，可提供编程灵活性、高性能和能效。在SE上执行的应用程序被表示为同步数据流（SDF）图的组合，其中每条指令被表示为一个节点。每个节点都需要映射到SE中正确的槽和数组，以保证程序的正确执行。这会产生一个具有巨大且稀疏搜索空间的优化问题，手动查找映射是不切实际的，因为它需要 SE 微架构的专业知识和知识。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个强化学习框架，具有全局图注意（GGA）模块和无效布局的输出屏蔽，以查找和优化指令调度。我们使用近端策略优化来训练一个模型，该模型根据对 SE 设备及其约束进行建模的奖励函数将操作放入 SE 块中。 GGA模块由图神经网络和注意力模块组成。图神经网络创建 SDF 的嵌入，并且注意力块用于对顺序操作放置进行建模。我们展示了如何将某些工作负载映射到 SE 以及影响映射质量的因素的结果。我们发现，平均而言，添加 GGA 可以使指令调度在所用的总时钟周期方面提高 10%，并且屏蔽可以将获得的奖励提高 20%。 本文提出一种基于强化学习的方法，用于将同步数据流（SDF）图映射到数据流架构的粗粒度可重构阵列（SE）中，以优化指令调度。 Andre Xian Ming Chang,Parth Khopkar,Bashar Romanous,Abhishek Chaurasia,Patrick Estep,Skyler Windh,Doug Vanesko,Sheik Dawood Beer Mohideen,Eugenio Culurciello cs.AR,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Ehsan Variani,Ke Wu,Michael Riley,David Rybach,Matt Shannon,Cyril Allauzen
title: Global Normalization for Streaming Speech Recognition in a Modular Framework
title_zh: 模块化框架中流式语音识别的全局标准化
abstract: We introduce the Globally Normalized Autoregressive Transducer (GNAT) for addressing the label bias problem in streaming speech recognition. Our solution admits a tractable exact computation of the denominator for the sequence-level normalization. Through theoretical and empirical results, we demonstrate that by switching to a globally normalized model, the word error rate gap between streaming and non-streaming speech-recognition models can be greatly reduced (by more than 50\% on the Librispeech dataset). This model is developed in a modular framework which encompasses all the common neural speech recognition models. The modularity of this framework enables controlled comparison of modelling choices and creation of new models.
summary: We introduce the Globally Normalized Autoregressive Transducer (GNAT) for addressing the label bias problem in streaming speech recognition. Our solution admits a tractable exact computation of the denominator for the sequence-level normalization. Through theoretical and empirical results, we demonstrate that by switching to a globally normalized model, the word error rate gap between streaming and non-streaming speech-recognition models can be greatly reduced (by more than 50\% on the Librispeech dataset). This model is developed in a modular framework which encompasses all the common neural speech recognition models. The modularity of this framework enables controlled comparison of modelling choices and creation of new models.
abstract_zh: 我们引入全局归一化自回归传感器（GNAT）来解决流式语音识别中的标签偏差问题。我们的解决方案允许对序列级归一化的分母进行易于处理的精确计算。通过理论和实证结果，我们证明，通过切换到全局标准化模型，可以大大减小流式和非流式语音识别模型之间的单词错误率差距（在 Librispeech 数据集上减少超过 50％）。该模型是在模块化框架中开发的，其中包含所有常见的神经语音识别模型。该框架的模块化可以控制建模选择的比较和新模型的创建。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种模块化框架下的全局归一化自回归转换器（GNAT），以解决流式语音识别中的标签偏差问题。
AI.motivation: 流式语音识别模型因标签偏差问题导致性能显著低于非流式模型，亟需有效解决方案。
AI.method: 通过引入全局归一化方法，实现序列级精确分母计算，并构建包含主流模型的模块化框架以支持对比实验。
AI.result: 在Librispeech数据集上，流式与非流式模型的词错误率差距缩小超过50%。
AI.conclusion: GNAT有效缓解了标签偏差问题，模块化设计促进了模型优化与创新。

authors_text: Zijie Li,Kazem Meidani,Amir Barati Farimani
title: Transformer for Partial Differential Equations' Operator Learning
title_zh: 用于偏微分方程算子学习的变压器
abstract: Data-driven learning of partial differential equations' solution operators has recently emerged as a promising paradigm for approximating the underlying solutions. The solution operators are usually parameterized by deep learning models that are built upon problem-specific inductive biases. An example is a convolutional or a graph neural network that exploits the local grid structure where functions' values are sampled. The attention mechanism, on the other hand, provides a flexible way to implicitly exploit the patterns within inputs, and furthermore, relationship between arbitrary query locations and inputs. In this work, we present an attention-based framework for data-driven operator learning, which we term Operator Transformer (OFormer). Our framework is built upon self-attention, cross-attention, and a set of point-wise multilayer perceptrons (MLPs), and thus it makes few assumptions on the sampling pattern of the input function or query locations. We show that the proposed framework is competitive on standard benchmark problems and can flexibly be adapted to randomly sampled input.
summary: Data-driven learning of partial differential equations' solution operators has recently emerged as a promising paradigm for approximating the underlying solutions. The solution operators are usually parameterized by deep learning models that are built upon problem-specific inductive biases. An example is a convolutional or a graph neural network that exploits the local grid structure where functions' values are sampled. The attention mechanism, on the other hand, provides a flexible way to implicitly exploit the patterns within inputs, and furthermore, relationship between arbitrary query locations and inputs. In this work, we present an attention-based framework for data-driven operator learning, which we term Operator Transformer (OFormer). Our framework is built upon self-attention, cross-attention, and a set of point-wise multilayer perceptrons (MLPs), and thus it makes few assumptions on the sampling pattern of the input function or query locations. We show that the proposed framework is competitive on standard benchmark problems and can flexibly be adapted to randomly sampled input.
abstract_zh: 偏微分方程解算子的数据驱动学习最近已成为逼近底层解的有前途的范例。解决方案运算符通常由基于特定问题的归纳偏差构建的深度学习模型参数化。一个例子是卷积或图神经网络，它利用对函数值进行采样的局部网格结构。另一方面，注意力机制提供了一种灵活的方式来隐式地利用输入中的模式，以及任意查询位置和输入之间的关系。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个基于注意力的数据驱动算子学习框架，我们将其称为 Operator Transformer (OFormer)。我们的框架建立在自注意力、交叉注意力和一组逐点多层感知器（MLP）的基础上，因此它对输入函数或查询位置的采样模式做出很少的假设。我们表明，所提出的框架在标准基准问题上具有竞争力，并且可以灵活地适应随机采样的输入。

AI.tldr: 提出基于Transformer的Operator Transformer（OFormer）框架，用于数据驱动的偏微分方程解算子学习
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖特定网格结构，而注意力机制能灵活捕捉输入模式及任意位置关系，提升算子学习的灵活性和适应性
AI.method: 结合自注意力、交叉注意力和点-wise MLP构建OFormer框架，减少对输入采样模式的假设
AI.result: 在标准基准问题上表现优异，能灵活适应随机采样输入
AI.conclusion: OFormer框架有效，证明了Transformer在数据驱动偏微分方程算子学习中的潜力

authors_text: Nyle Siddiqui,Rushit Dave,Naeem Seliya,Mounika Vanamala
title: Machine and Deep Learning Applications to Mouse Dynamics for Continuous User Authentication
title_zh: 机器和深度学习应用到鼠标动力学以实现连续用户身份验证
abstract: Static authentication methods, like passwords, grow increasingly weak with advancements in technology and attack strategies. Continuous authentication has been proposed as a solution, in which users who have gained access to an account are still monitored in order to continuously verify that the user is not an imposter who had access to the user credentials. Mouse dynamics is the behavior of a users mouse movements and is a biometric that has shown great promise for continuous authentication schemes. This article builds upon our previous published work by evaluating our dataset of 40 users using three machine learning and deep learning algorithms. Two evaluation scenarios are considered: binary classifiers are used for user authentication, with the top performer being a 1-dimensional convolutional neural network with a peak average test accuracy of 85.73% across the top 10 users. Multi class classification is also examined using an artificial neural network which reaches an astounding peak accuracy of 92.48% the highest accuracy we have seen for any classifier on this dataset.
summary: Static authentication methods, like passwords, grow increasingly weak with advancements in technology and attack strategies. Continuous authentication has been proposed as a solution, in which users who have gained access to an account are still monitored in order to continuously verify that the user is not an imposter who had access to the user credentials. Mouse dynamics is the behavior of a users mouse movements and is a biometric that has shown great promise for continuous authentication schemes. This article builds upon our previous published work by evaluating our dataset of 40 users using three machine learning and deep learning algorithms. Two evaluation scenarios are considered: binary classifiers are used for user authentication, with the top performer being a 1-dimensional convolutional neural network with a peak average test accuracy of 85.73% across the top 10 users. Multi class classification is also examined using an artificial neural network which reaches an astounding peak accuracy of 92.48% the highest accuracy we have seen for any classifier on this dataset.
abstract_zh: 随着技术和攻击策略的进步，静态身份验证方法（例如密码）变得越来越弱。连续身份验证已被提出作为一种解决方案，其中仍然监视已获得帐户访问权限的用户，以便持续验证该用户不是有权访问用户凭据的冒名顶替者。鼠标动态是用户鼠标移动的行为，是一种生物识别技术，在连续身份验证方案中显示出巨大的前景。本文基于我们之前发表的工作，使用三种机器学习和深度学习算法评估了 40 个用户的数据集。考虑两种评估场景：二元分类器用于用户身份验证，表现最好的是一维卷积神经网络，前 10 位用户的峰值平均测试准确度为 85.73%。还使用人工神经网络对多类分类进行了检查，该网络达到了令人震惊的峰值准确度 92.48%，这是我们在该数据集上见过的任何分类器的最高准确度。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了三种机器学习和深度学习算法在鼠标动态数据集上的连续用户认证效果。
AI.motivation: 静态认证方法（如密码）因技术进步和攻击策略而变得脆弱，需通过连续认证监控用户行为以防止凭证泄露后的伪装攻击。
AI.method: 基于40用户数据集，采用二分类（1D卷积神经网络）和多分类（人工神经网络）两种场景进行算法评估。
AI.result: 二分类中CNN达到85.73%的最高测试准确率，多分类中ANN达到92.48%的峰值准确率（为该数据集最佳表现）。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习模型在鼠标动态连续认证中表现优异，尤其ANN在多分类任务中展现出显著潜力。

ai_content.tldr: 本文评估了三种机器学习和深度学习算法在鼠标动态数据集上的连续用户认证效果。
ai_content.motivation: 静态认证方法（如密码）因技术进步和攻击策略而变得脆弱，需通过连续认证监控用户行为以防止凭证泄露后的伪装攻击。
ai_content.method: 基于40用户数据集，采用二分类（1D卷积神经网络）和多分类（人工神经网络）两种场景进行算法评估。
ai_content.result: 二分类中CNN达到85.73%的最高测试准确率，多分类中ANN达到92.48%的峰值准确率（为该数据集最佳表现）。
ai_content.conclusion: 深度学习模型在鼠标动态连续认证中表现优异，尤其ANN在多分类任务中展现出显著潜力。

search_text: Machine and Deep Learning Applications to Mouse Dynamics for Continuous User Authentication 机器和深度学习应用到鼠标动力学以实现连续用户身份验证 Static authentication methods, like passwords, grow increasingly weak with advancements in technology and attack strategies. Continuous authentication has been proposed as a solution, in which users who have gained access to an account are still monitored in order to continuously verify that the user is not an imposter who had access to the user credentials. Mouse dynamics is the behavior of a users mouse movements and is a biometric that has shown great promise for continuous authentication schemes. This article builds upon our previous published work by evaluating our dataset of 40 users using three machine learning and deep learning algorithms. Two evaluation scenarios are considered: binary classifiers are used for user authentication, with the top performer being a 1-dimensional convolutional neural network with a peak average test accuracy of 85.73% across the top 10 users. Multi class classification is also examined using an artificial neural network which reaches an astounding peak accuracy of 92.48% the highest accuracy we have seen for any classifier on this dataset. 随着技术和攻击策略的进步，静态身份验证方法（例如密码）变得越来越弱。连续身份验证已被提出作为一种解决方案，其中仍然监视已获得帐户访问权限的用户，以便持续验证该用户不是有权访问用户凭据的冒名顶替者。鼠标动态是用户鼠标移动的行为，是一种生物识别技术，在连续身份验证方案中显示出巨大的前景。本文基于我们之前发表的工作，使用三种机器学习和深度学习算法评估了 40 个用户的数据集。考虑两种评估场景：二元分类器用于用户身份验证，表现最好的是一维卷积神经网络，前 10 位用户的峰值平均测试准确度为 85.73%。还使用人工神经网络对多类分类进行了检查，该网络达到了令人震惊的峰值准确度 92.48%，这是我们在该数据集上见过的任何分类器的最高准确度。 本文评估了三种机器学习和深度学习算法在鼠标动态数据集上的连续用户认证效果。 Nyle Siddiqui,Rushit Dave,Naeem Seliya,Mounika Vanamala cs.AI

authors_text: Eloy Geenjaar,Amrit Kashyap,Noah Lewis,Robyn Miller,Vince Calhoun
title: Spatio-temporally separable non-linear latent factor learning: an application to somatomotor cortex fMRI data
title_zh: 时空可分离非线性潜在因子学习：在躯体运动皮层功能磁共振成像数据中的应用
abstract: Functional magnetic resonance imaging (fMRI) data contain complex spatiotemporal dynamics, thus researchers have developed approaches that reduce the dimensionality of the signal while extracting relevant and interpretable dynamics. Models of fMRI data that can perform whole-brain discovery of dynamical latent factors are understudied. The benefits of approaches such as linear independent component analysis models have been widely appreciated, however, nonlinear extensions of these models present challenges in terms of identification. Deep learning methods provide a way forward, but new methods for efficient spatial weight-sharing are critical to deal with the high dimensionality of the data and the presence of noise. Our approach generalizes weight sharing to non-Euclidean neuroimaging data by first performing spectral clustering based on the structural and functional similarity between voxels. The spectral clusters and their assignments can then be used as patches in an adapted multi-layer perceptron (MLP)-mixer model to share parameters among input points. To encourage temporally independent latent factors, we use an additional total correlation term in the loss. Our approach is evaluated on data with multiple motor sub-tasks to assess whether the model captures disentangled latent factors that correspond to each sub-task. Then, to assess the latent factors we find further, we compare the spatial location of each latent factor to the motor homunculus. Finally, we show that our approach captures task effects better than the current gold standard of source signal separation, independent component analysis (ICA).
summary: Functional magnetic resonance imaging (fMRI) data contain complex spatiotemporal dynamics, thus researchers have developed approaches that reduce the dimensionality of the signal while extracting relevant and interpretable dynamics. Models of fMRI data that can perform whole-brain discovery of dynamical latent factors are understudied. The benefits of approaches such as linear independent component analysis models have been widely appreciated, however, nonlinear extensions of these models present challenges in terms of identification. Deep learning methods provide a way forward, but new methods for efficient spatial weight-sharing are critical to deal with the high dimensionality of the data and the presence of noise. Our approach generalizes weight sharing to non-Euclidean neuroimaging data by first performing spectral clustering based on the structural and functional similarity between voxels. The spectral clusters and their assignments can then be used as patches in an adapted multi-layer perceptron (MLP)-mixer model to share parameters among input points. To encourage temporally independent latent factors, we use an additional total correlation term in the loss. Our approach is evaluated on data with multiple motor sub-tasks to assess whether the model captures disentangled latent factors that correspond to each sub-task. Then, to assess the latent factors we find further, we compare the spatial location of each latent factor to the motor homunculus. Finally, we show that our approach captures task effects better than the current gold standard of source signal separation, independent component analysis (ICA).
abstract_zh: 功能磁共振成像 (fMRI) 数据包含复杂的时空动力学，因此研究人员开发了一些方法，可以降低信号的维数，同时提取相关且可解释的动力学。可以对动态潜在因素进行全脑发现的功能磁共振成像数据模型尚未得到充分研究。线性独立分量分析模型等方法的优点已得到广泛认可，然而，这些模型的非线性扩展在识别方面提出了挑战。深度学习方法提供了一条前进的道路，但有效空间权重共享的新方法对于处理数据的高维性和噪声的存在至关重要。我们的方法通过首先基于体素之间的结构和功能相似性执行谱聚类，将权重共享推广到非欧几里得神经影像数据。然后，谱簇及其分配可以用作自适应多层感知器 (MLP) 混合器模型中的补丁，以在输入点之间共享参数。为了鼓励时间独立的潜在因素，我们在损失中使用了额外的总相关项。我们的方法是对具有多个运动子任务的数据进行评估，以评估模型是否捕获了与每个子任务相对应的解开的潜在因素。然后，为了进一步评估我们发现的潜在因素，我们将每个潜在因素的空间位置与运动小人进行比较。最后，我们表明我们的方法比当前源信号分离、独立分量分析（ICA）的黄金标准更好地捕捉任务效果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种非线性潜在因子学习方法，用于分离体感运动皮层fMRI数据中的时空动态特征。
AI.motivation: 现有线性模型（如ICA）难以处理fMRI的高维非线性特性，而深度学习方法需要解决空间权重共享与噪声干扰问题。
AI.method: 基于谱聚类划分voxel空间相似性区域，构建MLP-mixer模型实现参数共享，并引入总相关性损失项约束时间独立性。
AI.result: 方法在多任务运动数据中成功分离出对应子任务的潜在因子，空间分布与运动皮层图谱一致，优于传统ICA方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效实现了fMRI数据的时空潜在因子解耦，为神经影像分析提供了新的非线性建模框架。

search_text: Spatio-temporally separable non-linear latent factor learning: an application to somatomotor cortex fMRI data 时空可分离非线性潜在因子学习：在躯体运动皮层功能磁共振成像数据中的应用 Functional magnetic resonance imaging (fMRI) data contain complex spatiotemporal dynamics, thus researchers have developed approaches that reduce the dimensionality of the signal while extracting relevant and interpretable dynamics. The spectral clusters and their assignments can then be used as patches in an adapted multi-layer perceptron (MLP)-mixer model to share parameters among input points. authors_text: Hannah Schieber,Fabian Duerr,Torsten Schoen,Jürgen Beyerer
title: Deep Sensor Fusion with Pyramid Fusion Networks for 3D Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 用于 3D 语义分割的深度传感器融合与金字塔融合网络
comment: conditionally accepted at IEEE IV 2022, 7 pages, 4 figures, 5 tables
comments: conditionally accepted at IEEE IV 2022, 7 pages, 4 figures, 5 tables
abstract: Robust environment perception for autonomous vehicles is a tremendous challenge, which makes a diverse sensor set with e.g. camera, lidar and radar crucial. In the process of understanding the recorded sensor data, 3D semantic segmentation plays an important role. Therefore, this work presents a pyramid-based deep fusion architecture for lidar and camera to improve 3D semantic segmentation of traffic scenes. Individual sensor backbones extract feature maps of camera images and lidar point clouds. A novel Pyramid Fusion Backbone fuses these feature maps at different scales and combines the multimodal features in a feature pyramid to compute valuable multimodal, multi-scale features. The Pyramid Fusion Head aggregates these pyramid features and further refines them in a late fusion step, incorporating the final features of the sensor backbones. The approach is evaluated on two challenging outdoor datasets and different fusion strategies and setups are investigated. It outperforms recent range view based lidar approaches as well as all so far proposed fusion strategies and architectures.
summary: Robust environment perception for autonomous vehicles is a tremendous challenge, which makes a diverse sensor set with e.g. camera, lidar and radar crucial. In the process of understanding the recorded sensor data, 3D semantic segmentation plays an important role. Therefore, this work presents a pyramid-based deep fusion architecture for lidar and camera to improve 3D semantic segmentation of traffic scenes. Individual sensor backbones extract feature maps of camera images and lidar point clouds. A novel Pyramid Fusion Backbone fuses these feature maps at different scales and combines the multimodal features in a feature pyramid to compute valuable multimodal, multi-scale features. The Pyramid Fusion Head aggregates these pyramid features and further refines them in a late fusion step, incorporating the final features of the sensor backbones. The approach is evaluated on two challenging outdoor datasets and different fusion strategies and setups are investigated. It outperforms recent range view based lidar approaches as well as all so far proposed fusion strategies and architectures.
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶汽车的鲁棒环境感知是一个巨大的挑战，这使得多样化的传感器组具有例如摄像头、激光雷达和雷达至关重要。在理解记录的传感器数据的过程中，3D 语义分割发挥着重要作用。因此，这项工作提出了一种基于金字塔的激光雷达和摄像头深度融合架构，以改善交通场景的 3D 语义分割。各个传感器主干提取相机图像和激光雷达点云的特征图。一种新颖的金字塔融合骨干融合了不同尺度的这些特征图，并将多模态特征组合在特征金字塔中，以计算有价值的多模态、多尺度特征。金字塔融合头聚合这些金字塔特征，并在后期融合步骤中进一步细化它们，合并传感器主干的最终特征。该方法在两个具有挑战性的室外数据集上进行了评估，并研究了不同的融合策略和设置。它优于最近基于距离视图的激光雷达方法以及迄今为止提出的所有融合策略和架构。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于金字塔融合网络的深度传感器融合方法，用于提升自动驾驶场景下3D语义分割的准确性。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶车辆需要多传感器（如摄像头、激光雷达）协同感知环境，但现有方法在多模态数据融合和多尺度特征提取方面存在局限，影响3D语义分割效果。
AI.method: 设计包含独立传感器主干网络和金字塔融合模块的架构：1）分别提取摄像头图像和激光雷达点云的特征图；2）通过金字塔融合主干在不同尺度融合多模态特征；3）利用金字塔融合头进行特征聚合与后期优化。
AI.result: 在两个户外数据集上验证，该方法在3D语义分割任务中优于现有基于激光雷达的范围视图方法及所有已提出的融合策略。
AI.conclusion: 金字塔融合网络通过多模态多尺度特征融合显著提升了3D语义分割性能，验证了该架构在自动驾驶环境感知中的有效性。

method: 设计包含独立传感器主干网络和金字塔融合模块的架构：1）分别提取摄像头图像和激光雷达点云的特征图；2）通过金字塔融合主干在不同尺度融合多模态特征；3）利用金字塔融合头进行特征聚合与后期优化。
result: 在两个户外数据集上验证，该方法在3D语义分割任务中优于现有基于激光雷达的范围视图方法及所有已提出的融合策略。
conclusion: 金字塔融合网络通过多模态多尺度特征融合显著提升了3D语义分割性能，验证了该架构在自动驾驶环境感知中的有效性。
search_text: Deep Sensor Fusion with Pyramid Fusion Networks for 3D Semantic Segmentation 用于 3D 语义分割的深度传感器融合与金字塔融合网络 Robust environment perception for autonomous vehicles is a tremendous challenge, which makes a diverse sensor set with e.g. camera, lidar and radar crucial. In the process of understanding the recorded sensor data, 3D semantic segmentation plays an important role. Therefore, this work presents a pyramid-based deep fusion architecture for lidar and camera to improve 3D semantic segmentation of traffic scenes. Individual sensor backbones extract feature maps of camera images and lidar point clouds. A novel Pyramid Fusion Backbone fuses these feature maps at different scales and combines the multimodal features in a feature pyramid to compute valuable multimodal, multi-scale features. The Pyramid Fusion Head aggregates these pyramid features and further refines them in a late fusion step, incorporating the final features of the sensor backbones. The approach is evaluated on two challenging outdoor datasets and different fusion strategies and setups are investigated. It outperforms recent range view based lidar approaches as well as all so far proposed fusion strategies and architectures. 自动驾驶汽车的鲁棒环境感知是一个巨大的挑战，这使得多样化的传感器组具有例如摄像头、激光雷达和雷达至关重要。在理解记录的传感器数据的过程中，3D 语义分割发挥着重要作用。因此，这项工作提出了一种基于金字塔的激光雷达和摄像头深度融合架构，以改善交通场景的 3D 语义分割。各个传感器主干提取相机图像和激光雷达点云的特征图。一种新颖的金字塔融合骨干融合了不同尺度的这些特征图，并将多模态特征组合在特征金字塔中，以计算有价值的多模态、多尺度特征。金字塔融合头聚合这些金字塔特征，并在后期融合步骤中进一步细化它们，合并传感器主干的最终特征。该方法在两个具有挑战性的室外数据集上进行了评估，并研究了不同的融合策略和设置。它优于最近基于距离视图的激光雷达方法以及迄今为止提出的所有融合策略和架构。 本文提出一种基于金字塔融合网络的深度传感器融合方法，用于提升自动驾驶场景下3D语义分割的准确性。 Hannah Schieber,Fabian Duerr,Torsten Schoen,Jürgen Beyerer cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.RO

authors_text: Mojmír Mutný,Andreas Krause
title: Experimental Design for Linear Functionals in Reproducing Kernel Hilbert Spaces
title_zh: 再现核希尔伯特空间中线性泛函的实验设计
abstract: Optimal experimental design seeks to determine the most informative allocation of experiments to infer an unknown statistical quantity. In this work, we investigate the optimal design of experiments for {\em estimation of linear functionals in reproducing kernel Hilbert spaces (RKHSs)}. This problem has been extensively studied in the linear regression setting under an estimability condition, which allows estimating parameters without bias. We generalize this framework to RKHSs, and allow for the linear functional to be only approximately inferred, i.e., with a fixed bias. This scenario captures many important modern applications, such as estimation of gradient maps, integrals, and solutions to differential equations. We provide algorithms for constructing bias-aware designs for linear functionals. We derive non-asymptotic confidence sets for fixed and adaptive designs under sub-Gaussian noise, enabling us to certify estimation with bounded error with high probability.
summary: Optimal experimental design seeks to determine the most informative allocation of experiments to infer an unknown statistical quantity. In this work, we investigate the optimal design of experiments for {\em estimation of linear functionals in reproducing kernel Hilbert spaces (RKHSs)}. This problem has been extensively studied in the linear regression setting under an estimability condition, which allows estimating parameters without bias. We generalize this framework to RKHSs, and allow for the linear functional to be only approximately inferred, i.e., with a fixed bias. This scenario captures many important modern applications, such as estimation of gradient maps, integrals, and solutions to differential equations. We provide algorithms for constructing bias-aware designs for linear functionals. We derive non-asymptotic confidence sets for fixed and adaptive designs under sub-Gaussian noise, enabling us to certify estimation with bounded error with high probability.
abstract_zh: 最佳实验设计旨在确定信息最丰富的实验分配，以推断未知的统计量。在这项工作中，我们研究了{\em估计再现核希尔伯特空间（RKHS）中的线性泛函}的实验的优化设计。这个问题在可估计性条件下的线性回归设置中得到了广泛的研究，它允许无偏差地估计参数。我们将此框架推广到 RKHS，并允许仅近似推断线性泛函，即具有固定偏差。该场景涵盖了许多重要的现代应用，例如梯度图的估计、积分和微分方程的解。我们提供用于构建线性泛函偏差感知设计的算法。我们在亚高斯噪声下导出固定和自适应设计的非渐近置信集，使我们能够以高概率验证有界误差的估计。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在再生核希尔伯特空间（RKHS）中估计线性泛函的最优实验设计问题，允许存在固定偏差并提供相应算法与理论分析。
AI.motivation: 传统线性回归框架下的实验设计依赖可估计性条件，但现代应用（如梯度估计、积分计算、微分方程求解）常需处理仅能近似推断的线性泛函，需扩展理论框架以适应此类场景。
AI.method: 提出偏差感知的实验设计算法，并在子高斯噪声下推导固定与自适应设计的非渐近置信集，实现高概率下的有界误差保证。
AI.result: 开发了适用于RKHS的偏差感知实验设计方法，理论分析表明其能在子高斯噪声条件下提供非渐近误差界，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过扩展经典实验设计框架至RKHS的近似推断场景，本文为现代科学计算与统计推断问题提供了理论支持与实用算法。

authors_text: Jacob Granley,Lucas Relic,Michael Beyeler
title: Hybrid Neural Autoencoders for Stimulus Encoding in Visual and Other Sensory Neuroprostheses
title_zh: 用于视觉和其他感觉神经假体中刺激编码的混合神经自动编码器
abstract: Sensory neuroprostheses are emerging as a promising technology to restore lost sensory function or augment human capabilities. However, sensations elicited by current devices often appear artificial and distorted. Although current models can predict the neural or perceptual response to an electrical stimulus, an optimal stimulation strategy solves the inverse problem: what is the required stimulus to produce a desired response? Here, we frame this as an end-to-end optimization problem, where a deep neural network stimulus encoder is trained to invert a known and fixed forward model that approximates the underlying biological system. As a proof of concept, we demonstrate the effectiveness of this Hybrid Neural Autoencoder (HNA) in visual neuroprostheses. We find that HNA produces high-fidelity patient-specific stimuli representing handwritten digits and segmented images of everyday objects, and significantly outperforms conventional encoding strategies across all simulated patients. Overall this is an important step towards the long-standing challenge of restoring high-quality vision to people living with incurable blindness and may prove a promising solution for a variety of neuroprosthetic technologies.
summary: Sensory neuroprostheses are emerging as a promising technology to restore lost sensory function or augment human capabilities. However, sensations elicited by current devices often appear artificial and distorted. Although current models can predict the neural or perceptual response to an electrical stimulus, an optimal stimulation strategy solves the inverse problem: what is the required stimulus to produce a desired response? Here, we frame this as an end-to-end optimization problem, where a deep neural network stimulus encoder is trained to invert a known and fixed forward model that approximates the underlying biological system. As a proof of concept, we demonstrate the effectiveness of this Hybrid Neural Autoencoder (HNA) in visual neuroprostheses. We find that HNA produces high-fidelity patient-specific stimuli representing handwritten digits and segmented images of everyday objects, and significantly outperforms conventional encoding strategies across all simulated patients. Overall this is an important step towards the long-standing challenge of restoring high-quality vision to people living with incurable blindness and may prove a promising solution for a variety of neuroprosthetic technologies.
abstract_zh: 感觉神经假体正在成为一项有前景的技术，可以恢复失去的感觉功能或增强人类能力。然而，当前设备引起的感觉常常显得不自然和扭曲。尽管当前模型可以预测对电刺激的神经或感知反应，但最佳刺激策略解决了反问题：产生所需反应所需的刺激是什么？在这里，我们将其视为一个端到端优化问题，其中深度神经网络刺激编码器经过训练以反转近似底层生物系统的已知且固定的前向模型。作为概念证明，我们展示了这种混合神经自动编码器（HNA）在视觉神经假体中的有效性。我们发现，海航能够产生代表手写数字和日常物体分段图像的高保真患者特定刺激，并且在所有模拟患者中显着优于传统编码策略。总体而言，这是朝着为无法治愈的失明患者恢复高质量视力这一长期挑战迈出的重要一步，并且可能被证明是各种神经修复技术的有前途的解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种混合神经自编码器（HNA），用于解决感官神经假体中刺激编码的逆问题，以生成高保真度的患者特定刺激信号。
AI.motivation: 现有神经假体设备产生的感觉往往失真，传统模型难以直接求解如何生成特定感知响应的刺激信号，亟需优化刺激策略以恢复自然感官体验。
AI.method: 通过端到端优化框架，训练深度神经网络刺激编码器逆推固定前向模型（模拟生物系统），构建混合神经自编码器（HNA）实现刺激信号生成。
AI.result: HNA在视觉神经假体模拟中成功生成手写数字和日常物品分割图像的高保真刺激信号，显著优于传统编码方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为不可逆盲症患者的高质量视觉恢复提供了重要进展，并可能推广至多种神经假体技术领域。

As a proof of concept, we demonstrate the effectiveness of this Hybrid Neural Autoencoder (HNA) in visual neuroprostheses. We find that HNA produces high-fidelity patient-specific stimuli representing handwritten digits and segmented images of everyday objects, and significantly outperforms conventional encoding strategies across all simulated patients. Overall this is an important step towards the long-standing challenge of restoring high-quality vision to people living with incurable blindness and may prove a promising solution for a variety of neuroprosthetic technologies. 感觉神经假体正在成为一项有前景的技术，可以恢复失去的感觉功能或增强人类能力。然而，当前设备引起的感觉常常显得不自然和扭曲。尽管当前模型可以预测对电刺激的神经或感知反应，但最佳刺激策略解决了反问题：产生所需反应所需的刺激是什么？在这里，我们将其视为一个端到端优化问题，其中深度神经网络刺激编码器经过训练以反转近似底层生物系统的已知且固定的前向模型。作为概念证明，我们展示了这种混合神经自动编码器（HNA）在视觉神经假体中的有效性。我们发现，海航能够产生代表手写数字和日常物体分段图像的高保真患者特定刺激，并且在所有模拟患者中显着优于传统编码策略。总体而言，这是朝着为无法治愈的失明患者恢复高质量视力这一长期挑战迈出的重要一步，并且可能被证明是各种神经修复技术的有前途的解决方案。 本文提出了一种混合神经自编码器（HNA），用于解决感官神经假体中刺激编码的逆问题，以生成高保真度的患者特定刺激信号。 Jacob Granley,Lucas Relic,Michael Beyeler cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Yunqi Li,Hanxiong Chen,Shuyuan Xu,Yingqiang Ge,Juntao Tan,Shuchang Liu,Yongfeng Zhang
title: Fairness in Recommendation: Foundations, Methods and Applications
title_zh: 推荐的公平性：基础、方法和应用
comment: Accepted by ACM Transactions on Intelligent Systems and Technology (TIST)
comments: Accepted by ACM Transactions on Intelligent Systems and Technology (TIST)
abstract: As one of the most pervasive applications of machine learning, recommender systems are playing an important role on assisting human decision making. The satisfaction of users and the interests of platforms are closely related to the quality of the generated recommendation results. However, as a highly data-driven system, recommender system could be affected by data or algorithmic bias and thus generate unfair results, which could weaken the reliance of the systems. As a result, it is crucial to address the potential unfairness problems in recommendation settings. Recently, there has been growing attention on fairness considerations in recommender systems with more and more literature on approaches to promote fairness in recommendation. However, the studies are rather fragmented and lack a systematic organization, thus making it difficult to penetrate for new researchers to the domain. This motivates us to provide a systematic survey of existing works on fairness in recommendation. This survey focuses on the foundations for fairness in recommendation literature. It first presents a brief introduction about fairness in basic machine learning tasks such as classification and ranking in order to provide a general overview of fairness research, as well as introduce the more complex situations and challenges that need to be considered when studying fairness in recommender systems. After that, the survey will introduce fairness in recommendation with a focus on the taxonomies of current fairness definitions, the typical techniques for improving fairness, as well as the datasets for fairness studies in recommendation. The survey also talks about the challenges and opportunities in fairness research with the hope of promoting the fair recommendation research area and beyond.

The survey also talks about the challenges and opportunities in fairness research with the hope of promoting the fair recommendation research area and beyond.
abstract_zh: 作为机器学习最普遍的应用之一，推荐系统在辅助人类决策方面发挥着重要作用。用户的满意度和平台的利益与生成的推荐结果的质量密切相关。然而，作为一个高度数据驱动的系统，推荐系统可能会受到数据或算法偏差的影响，从而产生不公平的结果，从而削弱系统的可靠性。因此，解决推荐设置中潜在的不公平问题至关重要。最近，人们越来越关注推荐系统中的公平性考虑，越来越多的文献介绍了促进推荐公平性的方法。然而，这些研究相当分散，缺乏系统的组织，从而使新的研究人员很难渗透到该领域。这促使我们对推荐公平性的现有研究进行系统调查。这项调查的重点是推荐文献公平性的基础。首先简要介绍了分类和排序等基本机器学习任务中的公平性，以提供公平性研究的总体概述，并介绍在研究推荐系统中的公平性时需要考虑的更复杂的情况和挑战。之后，调查将介绍推荐公平性，重点介绍当前公平性定义的分类、提高公平性的典型技术以及推荐公平性研究的数据集。该调查还讨论了公平性研究中的挑战和机遇，希望能够促进公平推荐研究领域及其他领域的发展。

AI.tldr: 本文对推荐系统中的公平性问题进行了系统性的综述，涵盖了其基础、方法和应用。
AI.motivation: 推荐系统作为机器学习的重要应用，可能受到数据或算法偏见的影响，产生不公平的结果，因此需要系统地研究和解决推荐系统中的公平性问题。
AI.method: 本文通过介绍基本机器学习任务中的公平性，梳理推荐系统中公平性的分类、典型技术及数据集，系统性地总结了现有研究。
AI.result: 本文为新研究者提供了关于推荐系统公平性问题的全面概述，包括公平性定义、改进方法及研究数据集。
AI.conclusion: 本文旨在推动推荐系统公平性研究的发展，并为未来的研究提供方向和参考。

authors_text: Avishag Shapira,Alon Zolfi,Luca Demetrio,Battista Biggio,Asaf Shabtai
title: Phantom Sponges: Exploiting Non-Maximum Suppression to Attack Deep Object Detectors
title_zh: 幻影海绵：利用非极大值抑制来攻击深层物体探测器
abstract: Adversarial attacks against deep learning-based object detectors have been studied extensively in the past few years. Most of the attacks proposed have targeted the model's integrity (i.e., caused the model to make incorrect predictions), while adversarial attacks targeting the model's availability, a critical aspect in safety-critical domains such as autonomous driving, have not yet been explored by the machine learning research community. In this paper, we propose a novel attack that negatively affects the decision latency of an end-to-end object detection pipeline. We craft a universal adversarial perturbation (UAP) that targets a widely used technique integrated in many object detector pipelines -- non-maximum suppression (NMS). Our experiments demonstrate the proposed UAP's ability to increase the processing time of individual frames by adding "phantom" objects that overload the NMS algorithm while preserving the detection of the original objects which allows the attack to go undetected for a longer period of time.
summary: Adversarial attacks against deep learning-based object detectors have been studied extensively in the past few years. Most of the attacks proposed have targeted the model's integrity (i.e., caused the model to make incorrect predictions), while adversarial attacks targeting the model's availability, a critical aspect in safety-critical domains such as autonomous driving, have not yet been explored by the machine learning research community. In this paper, we propose a novel attack that negatively affects the decision latency of an end-to-end object detection pipeline. We craft a universal adversarial perturbation (UAP) that targets a widely used technique integrated in many object detector pipelines -- non-maximum suppression (NMS). Our experiments demonstrate the proposed UAP's ability to increase the processing time of individual frames by adding "phantom" objects that overload the NMS algorithm while preserving the detection of the original objects which allows the attack to go undetected for a longer period of time.
abstract_zh: 在过去几年中，针对基于深度学习的目标检测器的对抗性攻击已得到广泛研究。大多数提出的攻击都针对模型的完整性（即导致模型做出错误的预测），而针对模型可用性的对抗性攻击（自动驾驶等安全关键领域的一个关键方面）尚未被机器学习研究社区探索。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的攻击，它会对端到端对象检测管道的决策延迟产生负面影响。我们设计了一种通用对抗性扰动（UAP），其目标是集成在许多目标检测器管道中的广泛使用的技术——非极大值抑制（NMS）。我们的实验证明，所提出的 UAP 能够通过添加使 NMS 算法过载的“幻影”对象来增加单个帧的处理时间，同时保留对原始对象的检测，从而允许攻击在较长时间内不被检测到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对深度学习目标检测器的新型攻击方法，通过利用非极大值抑制（NMS）技术降低系统可用性。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗攻击主要针对模型完整性（错误预测），但未充分研究影响系统可用性的攻击，而这对自动驾驶等安全关键领域具有重要威胁。
AI.method: 设计一种通用对抗扰动（UAP），在检测结果中注入大量虚假目标，通过膨胀NMS计算复杂度来增加单帧处理时间，同时保持真实目标检测结果不变。
AI.result: 实验表明该扰动能有效延长帧处理时间，且由于真实目标未被干扰，攻击可长期隐蔽存在而不被发现。
AI.conclusion: 本文揭示了NMS机制在目标检测系统中的潜在脆弱性，证明通过攻击系统可用性可造成更隐蔽的安全威胁，需重新评估检测器鲁棒性设计。

authors_text: Xiangyu Qi,Tinghao Xie,Jiachen T. Wang,Tong Wu,Saeed Mahloujifar,Prateek Mittal
title: Towards A Proactive ML Approach for Detecting Backdoor Poison Samples
title_zh: 探索用于检测后门毒物样本的主动机器学习方法
abstract: Adversaries can embed backdoors in deep learning models by introducing backdoor poison samples into training datasets. In this work, we investigate how to detect such poison samples to mitigate the threat of backdoor attacks. First, we uncover a post-hoc workflow underlying most prior work, where defenders passively allow the attack to proceed and then leverage the characteristics of the post-attacked model to uncover poison samples. We reveal that this workflow does not fully exploit defenders' capabilities, and defense pipelines built on it are prone to failure or performance degradation in many scenarios. Second, we suggest a paradigm shift by promoting a proactive mindset in which defenders engage proactively with the entire model training and poison detection pipeline, directly enforcing and magnifying distinctive characteristics of the post-attacked model to facilitate poison detection. Based on this, we formulate a unified framework and provide practical insights on designing detection pipelines that are more robust and generalizable. Third, we introduce the technique of Confusion Training (CT) as a concrete instantiation of our framework. CT applies an additional poisoning attack to the already poisoned dataset, actively decoupling benign correlation while exposing backdoor patterns to detection. Empirical evaluations on 4 datasets and 14 types of attacks validate the superiority of CT over 14 baseline defenses.
summary: Adversaries can embed backdoors in deep learning models by introducing backdoor poison samples into training datasets. In this work, we investigate how to detect such poison samples to mitigate the threat of backdoor attacks. First, we uncover a post-hoc workflow underlying most prior work, where defenders passively allow the attack to proceed and then leverage the characteristics of the post-attacked model to uncover poison samples. We reveal that this workflow does not fully exploit defenders' capabilities, and defense pipelines built on it are prone to failure or performance degradation in many scenarios. Second, we suggest a paradigm shift by promoting a proactive mindset in which defenders engage proactively with the entire model training and poison detection pipeline, directly enforcing and magnifying distinctive characteristics of the post-attacked model to facilitate poison detection. Based on this, we formulate a unified framework and provide practical insights on designing detection pipelines that are more robust and generalizable. Third, we introduce the technique of Confusion Training (CT) as a concrete instantiation of our framework. CT applies an additional poisoning attack to the already poisoned dataset, actively decoupling benign correlation while exposing backdoor patterns to detection. Empirical evaluations on 4 datasets and 14 types of attacks validate the superiority of CT over 14 baseline defenses.
abstract_zh: 攻击者可以通过将后门毒样本引入训练数据集中，将后门嵌入深度学习模型中。在这项工作中，我们研究如何检测此类毒物样本以减轻后门攻击的威胁。首先，我们揭示了大多数先前工作背后的事后工作流程，其中防御者被动地允许攻击继续进行，然后利用攻击后模型的特征来发现毒样本。我们发现，该工作流程并未充分利用防御者的能力，并且基于其构建的防御管道在许多情况下容易出现故障或性能下降。其次，我们建议进行范式转变，倡导积极主动的心态，让防御者主动参与整个模型训练和毒物检测流程，直接执行和放大攻击后模型的独特特征，以促进毒物检测。在此基础上，我们制定了一个统一的框架，并为设计更强大和更通用的检测管道提供了实用的见解。第三，我们介绍混淆训练（CT）技术作为我们框架的具体实例。 CT 对已经中毒的数据集应用额外的中毒攻击，主动解耦良性相关性，同时暴露后门模式以供检测。对 4 个数据集和 14 种攻击类型的实证评估验证了 CT 相对于 14 种基线防御的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种主动机器学习方法，用于检测深度学习模型中的后门投毒样本。
AI.motivation: 现有防御方法被动应对后门攻击，依赖攻击后的模型特征，导致防御效果有限且易受攻击场景影响。
AI.method: 提出主动防御范式，通过混淆训练（CT）技术对已投毒数据集施加额外攻击，主动分离良性关联并暴露后门模式。
AI.result: 在4个数据集和14种攻击类型上的实验表明，CT方法优于14种基线防御方法。
AI.conclusion: 主动防御框架能更有效检测后门投毒样本，为构建鲁棒且通用的防御系统提供新思路。

authors_text: Xiangyu Qi,Tinghao Xie,Yiming Li,Saeed Mahloujifar,Prateek Mittal
title: Circumventing Backdoor Defenses That Are Based on Latent Separability
title_zh: 规避基于潜在可分离性的后门防御
abstract: Recent studies revealed that deep learning is susceptible to backdoor poisoning attacks. An adversary can embed a hidden backdoor into a model to manipulate its predictions by only modifying a few training data, without controlling the training process. Currently, a tangible signature has been widely observed across a diverse set of backdoor poisoning attacks -- models trained on a poisoned dataset tend to learn separable latent representations for poison and clean samples. This latent separation is so pervasive that a family of backdoor defenses directly take it as a default assumption (dubbed latent separability assumption), based on which to identify poison samples via cluster analysis in the latent space. An intriguing question consequently follows: is the latent separation unavoidable for backdoor poisoning attacks? This question is central to understanding whether the assumption of latent separability provides a reliable foundation for defending against backdoor poisoning attacks. In this paper, we design adaptive backdoor poisoning attacks to present counter-examples against this assumption. Our methods include two key components: (1) a set of trigger-planted samples correctly labeled to their semantic classes (other than the target class) that can regularize backdoor learning; (2) asymmetric trigger planting strategies that help to boost attack success rate (ASR) as well as to diversify latent representations of poison samples. Extensive experiments on benchmark datasets verify the effectiveness of our adaptive attacks in bypassing existing latent separation based backdoor defenses. Moreover, our attacks still maintain a high attack success rate with negligible clean accuracy drop. Our studies call for defense designers to take caution when leveraging latent separation as an assumption in their defenses.
summary: Recent studies revealed that deep learning is susceptible to backdoor poisoning attacks. An adversary can embed a hidden backdoor into a model to manipulate its predictions by only modifying a few training data, without controlling the training process. Currently, a tangible signature has been widely observed across a diverse set of backdoor poisoning attacks -- models trained on a poisoned dataset tend to learn separable latent representations for poison and clean samples. This latent separation is so pervasive that a family of backdoor defenses directly take it as a default assumption (dubbed latent separability assumption), based on which to identify poison samples via cluster analysis in the latent space. An intriguing question consequently follows: is the latent separation unavoidable for backdoor poisoning attacks? This question is central to understanding whether the assumption of latent separability provides a reliable foundation for defending against backdoor poisoning attacks. In this paper, we design adaptive backdoor poisoning attacks to present counter-examples against this assumption. Our methods include two key components: (1) a set of trigger-planted samples correctly labeled to their semantic classes (other than the target class) that can regularize backdoor learning; (2) asymmetric trigger planting strategies that help to boost attack success rate (ASR) as well as to diversify latent representations of poison samples. Extensive experiments on benchmark datasets verify the effectiveness of our adaptive attacks in bypassing existing latent separation based backdoor defenses. Moreover, our attacks still maintain a high attack success rate with negligible clean accuracy drop. Our studies call for defense designers to take caution when leveraging latent separation as an assumption in their defenses.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究表明，深度学习很容易受到后门中毒攻击。对手可以将隐藏的后门嵌入模型中，仅通过修改一些训练数据来操纵其预测，而无需控制训练过程。目前，在一系列不同的后门中毒攻击中已经广泛观察到了有形的签名——在中毒数据集上训练的模型往往会学习有毒样本和干净样本的可分离的潜在表示。这种潜在分离如此普遍，以至于一系列后门防御直接将其作为默认假设（称为潜在可分离性假设），并在此基础上通过潜在空间中的聚类分析来识别毒物样本。因此，一个有趣的问题随之而来：后门中毒攻击是否不可避免地存在潜在分离？这个问题对于理解潜在可分离性假设是否为防御后门中毒攻击提供可靠的基础至关重要。在本文中，我们设计了自适应后门中毒攻击，以提出反对这一假设的反例。我们的方法包括两个关键组成部分：（1）一组正确标记其语义类别（目标类别除外）的触发植入样本，可以规范后门学习； （2）不对称触发植入策略有助于提高攻击成功率（ASR）并使毒物样本的潜在表示多样化。对基准数据集的大量实验验证了我们的自适应攻击在绕过现有的基于潜在分离的后门防御方面的有效性。此外，我们的攻击仍然保持较高的攻击成功率，而干净的准确率下降可以忽略不计。我们的研究呼吁国防设计者在利用潜在分离作为防御假设时要小心。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种绕过基于潜在可分离性假设的后门防御方法，通过设计自适应后门攻击来挑战该假设。
AI.motivation: 现有后门防御普遍基于'中毒样本与干净样本在潜在空间中可分离'的假设，但该假设是否具有普适性尚未被验证，需通过攻击性实验进行挑战。
AI.method: 设计包含语义正确标签的触发样本进行正则化训练，并采用非对称触发策略提升攻击成功率同时多样化潜在表示。
AI.result: 实验表明攻击能有效绕过现有基于潜在分离的防御方案，且保持高攻击成功率和几乎无清洁准确率下降。
AI.conclusion: 防御设计需谨慎依赖潜在可分离性假设，攻击方法揭示了该假设在后门防御中的局限性。

authors_text: Mike A. Merrill,Tim Althoff
title: Self-supervised Pretraining and Transfer Learning Enable Flu and COVID-19 Predictions in Small Mobile Sensing Datasets
title_zh: 自监督预训练和迁移学习可在小型移动传感数据集中进行流感和 COVID-19 预测
abstract: Detailed mobile sensing data from phones, watches, and fitness trackers offer an unparalleled opportunity to quantify and act upon previously unmeasurable behavioral changes in order to improve individual health and accelerate responses to emerging diseases. Unlike in natural language processing and computer vision, deep representation learning has yet to broadly impact this domain, in which the vast majority of research and clinical applications still rely on manually defined features and boosted tree models or even forgo predictive modeling altogether due to insufficient accuracy. This is due to unique challenges in the behavioral health domain, including very small datasets (~10^1 participants), which frequently contain missing data, consist of long time series with critical long-range dependencies (length>10^4), and extreme class imbalances (>10^3:1). Here, we introduce a neural architecture for multivariate time series classification designed to address these unique domain challenges. Our proposed behavioral representation learning approach combines novel tasks for self-supervised pretraining and transfer learning to address data scarcity, and captures long-range dependencies across long-history time series through transformer self-attention following convolutional neural network-based dimensionality reduction. We propose an evaluation framework aimed at reflecting expected real-world performance in plausible deployment scenarios. Concretely, we demonstrate (1) performance improvements over baselines of up to 0.15 ROC AUC across five prediction tasks, (2) transfer learning-induced performance improvements of 16% PR AUC in small data scenarios, and (3) the potential of transfer learning in novel disease scenarios through an exploratory case study of zero-shot COVID-19 prediction in an independent data set. Finally, we discuss potential implications for medical surveillance testing.
summary: Detailed mobile sensing data from phones, watches, and fitness trackers offer an unparalleled opportunity to quantify and act upon previously unmeasurable behavioral changes in order to improve individual health and accelerate responses to emerging diseases. Unlike in natural language processing and computer vision, deep representation learning has yet to broadly impact this domain, in which the vast majority of research and clinical applications still rely on manually defined features and boosted tree models or even forgo predictive modeling altogether due to insufficient accuracy. This is due to unique challenges in the behavioral health domain, including very small datasets (~10^1 participants), which frequently contain missing data, consist of long time series with critical long-range dependencies (length>10^4), and extreme class imbalances (>10^3:1). Here, we introduce a neural architecture for multivariate time series classification designed to address these unique domain challenges. Our proposed behavioral representation learning approach combines novel tasks for self-supervised pretraining and transfer learning to address data scarcity, and captures long-range dependencies across long-history time series through transformer self-attention following convolutional neural network-based dimensionality reduction. We propose an evaluation framework aimed at reflecting expected real-world performance in plausible deployment scenarios. Concretely, we demonstrate (1) performance improvements over baselines of up to 0.15 ROC AUC across five prediction tasks, (2) transfer learning-induced performance improvements of 16% PR AUC in small data scenarios, and (3) the potential of transfer learning in novel disease scenarios through an exploratory case study of zero-shot COVID-19 prediction in an independent data set. Finally, we discuss potential implications for medical surveillance testing.
abstract_zh: 来自手机、手表和健身追踪器的详细移动传感数据提供了无与伦比的机会来量化以前无法测量的行为变化并采取行动，以改善个人健康并加速对新出现疾病的反应。与自然语言处理和计算机视觉不同，深度表示学习尚未广泛影响该领域，其中绝大多数研究和临床应用仍然依赖于手动定义的特征和增强树模型，甚至由于准确性不足而完全放弃预测建模。这是由于行为健康领域的独特挑战，包括非常小的数据集（~10^1 参与者），经常包含缺失数据，由具有关键远程依赖性的长时间序列（长度>10^4）和极端的类别不平衡（>10^3:1）组成。在这里，我们介绍了一种用于多元时间序列分类的神经架构，旨在解决这些独特的领域挑战。我们提出的行为表示学习方法结合了自监督预训练和迁移学习的新颖任务来解决数据稀缺问题，并通过基于卷积神经网络的降维之后的变压器自注意力来捕获跨长期历史时间序列的长期依赖性。我们提出了一个评估框架，旨在反映合理部署场景中的预期实际性能。具体来说，我们证明了（1）五个预测任务的性能较基线提高了高达 0.15 ROC AUC，（2）小数据场景中迁移学习引起的 PR AUC 性能提升了 16%，以及（3）通过独立数据集中零样本 COVID-19 预测的探索性案例研究，迁移学习在新疾病场景中的潜力。最后，我们讨论了医疗监测测试的潜在影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合自监督预训练与迁移学习的神经网络架构，用于在小规模移动传感数据集上预测流感和COVID-19，解决行为健康领域数据量小、长时序依赖和类别不平衡等挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有研究因移动传感数据集规模小、缺失值多、长时序依赖性强及类别不平衡，仍依赖传统手动特征和树模型，深度学习应用受限，亟需新方法提升预测性能。
AI.method: 设计多变量时间序列分类神经网络，结合自监督预训练和迁移学习应对数据稀缺，通过卷积降维后使用Transformer自注意力机制捕捉长时序依赖，并构建真实部署场景的评估框架。
AI.result: 在五项任务中ROC AUC提升0.15，小数据场景PR AUC提升16%，并通过零样本迁移验证了模型在独立数据集预测新疾病（如COVID-19）的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升小数据下的疾病预测性能，迁移学习在数据稀缺和新型疾病场景中表现突出，为医学监测提供可行的技术路径。

search_text: Self-supervised Pretraining and Transfer Learning Enable Flu and COVID-19 Predictions in Small Mobile Sensing Datasets 自监督预训练和迁移学习可在小型移动传感数据集中进行流感和 COVID-19 预测 Detailed mobile sensing data from phones, watches, and fitness trackers offer an unparalleled opportunity to quantify and act upon previously unmeasurable behavioral changes in order to improve individual health and accelerate responses to emerging diseases. Unlike in natural language processing and computer vision, deep representation learning has yet to broadly impact this domain, in which the vast majority of research and clinical applications still rely on manually defined features and boosted tree models or even forgo predictive modeling altogether due to insufficient accuracy. This is due to unique challenges in the behavioral health domain, including very small datasets (~10^1 participants), which frequently contain missing data, consist of long time series with critical long-range dependencies (length>10^4), and extreme class imbalances (>10^3:1). Here, we introduce a neural architecture for multivariate time series classification designed to address these unique domain challenges. Our proposed behavioral representation learning approach combines novel tasks for self-supervised pretraining and transfer learning to address data scarcity, and captures long-range dependencies across long-history time series through transformer self-attention following convolutional neural network-based dimensionality reduction. We propose an evaluation framework aimed at reflecting expected real-world performance in plausible deployment scenarios. Concretely, we demonstrate (1) performance improvements over baselines of up to 0.15 ROC AUC across five prediction tasks, (2) transfer learning-induced performance improvements of 16% PR AUC in small data scenarios, and (3) the potential of transfer learning in novel disease scenarios through an exploratory case study of zero-shot COVID-19 prediction in an independent data set. Finally, we discuss potential implications for medical surveillance testing. 来自手机、手表和健身追踪器的详细移动传感数据提供了无与伦比的机会来量化以前无法测量的行为变化并采取行动，以改善个人健康并加速对新出现疾病的反应。与自然语言处理和计算机视觉不同，深度表示学习尚未广泛影响该领域，其中绝大多数研究和临床应用仍然依赖于手动定义的特征和增强树模型，甚至由于准确性不足而完全放弃预测建模。这是由于行为健康领域的独特挑战，包括非常小的数据集（~10^1 参与者），经常包含缺失数据，由具有关键远程依赖性的长时间序列（长度>10^4）和极端的类别不平衡（>10^3:1）组成。在这里，我们介绍了一种用于多元时间序列分类的神经架构，旨在解决这些独特的领域挑战。我们提出的行为表示学习方法结合了自监督预训练和迁移学习的新颖任务来解决数据稀缺问题，并通过基于卷积神经网络的降维之后的变压器自注意力来捕获跨长期历史时间序列的长期依赖性。我们提出了一个评估框架，旨在反映合理部署场景中的预期实际性能。具体来说，我们证明了（1）五个预测任务的性能较基线提高了高达 0.15 ROC AUC，（2）小数据场景中迁移学习引起的 PR AUC 性能提升了 16%，以及（3）通过独立数据集中零样本 COVID-19 预测的探索性案例研究，迁移学习在新疾病场景中的潜力。最后，我们讨论了医疗监测测试的潜在影响。 本文提出一种结合自监督预训练与迁移学习的神经网络架构，用于在小规模移动传感数据集上预测流感和COVID-19，解决行为健康领域数据量小、长时序依赖和类别不平衡等挑战。 Mike A. authors_text: Vittorio Caggiano,Huawei Wang,Guillaume Durandau,Massimo Sartori,Vikash Kumar
title: MyoSuite -- A contact-rich simulation suite for musculoskeletal motor control
title_zh: MyoSuite——用于肌肉骨骼运动控制的接触丰富的模拟套件
abstract: Embodied agents in continuous control domains have had limited exposure to tasks allowing to explore musculoskeletal properties that enable agile and nimble behaviors in biological beings. The sophistication behind neuro-musculoskeletal control can pose new challenges for the motor learning community. At the same time, agents solving complex neural control problems allow impact in fields such as neuro-rehabilitation, as well as collaborative-robotics. Human biomechanics underlies complex multi-joint-multi-actuator musculoskeletal systems. The sensory-motor system relies on a range of sensory-contact rich and proprioceptive inputs that define and condition muscle actuation required to exhibit intelligent behaviors in the physical world. Current frameworks for musculoskeletal control do not support physiological sophistication of the musculoskeletal systems along with physical world interaction capabilities. In addition, they are neither embedded in complex and skillful motor tasks nor are computationally effective and scalable to study large-scale learning paradigms. Here, we present MyoSuite -- a suite of physiologically accurate biomechanical models of elbow, wrist, and hand, with physical contact capabilities, which allow learning of complex and skillful contact-rich real-world tasks. We provide diverse motor-control challenges: from simple postural control to skilled hand-object interactions such as turning a key, twirling a pen, rotating two balls in one hand, etc. By supporting physiological alterations in musculoskeletal geometry (tendon transfer), assistive devices (exoskeleton assistance), and muscle contraction dynamics (muscle fatigue, sarcopenia), we present real-life tasks with temporal changes, thereby exposing realistic non-stationary conditions in our tasks which most continuous control benchmarks lack.
summary: Embodied agents in continuous control domains have had limited exposure to tasks allowing to explore musculoskeletal properties that enable agile and nimble behaviors in biological beings. The sophistication behind neuro-musculoskeletal control can pose new challenges for the motor learning community. At the same time, agents solving complex neural control problems allow impact in fields such as neuro-rehabilitation, as well as collaborative-robotics. Human biomechanics underlies complex multi-joint-multi-actuator musculoskeletal systems. The sensory-motor system relies on a range of sensory-contact rich and proprioceptive inputs that define and condition muscle actuation required to exhibit intelligent behaviors in the physical world. Current frameworks for musculoskeletal control do not support physiological sophistication of the musculoskeletal systems along with physical world interaction capabilities. In addition, they are neither embedded in complex and skillful motor tasks nor are computationally effective and scalable to study large-scale learning paradigms. Here, we present MyoSuite -- a suite of physiologically accurate biomechanical models of elbow, wrist, and hand, with physical contact capabilities, which allow learning of complex and skillful contact-rich real-world tasks. We provide diverse motor-control challenges: from simple postural control to skilled hand-object interactions such as turning a key, twirling a pen, rotating two balls in one hand, etc. By supporting physiological alterations in musculoskeletal geometry (tendon transfer), assistive devices (exoskeleton assistance), and muscle contraction dynamics (muscle fatigue, sarcopenia), we present real-life tasks with temporal changes, thereby exposing realistic non-stationary conditions in our tasks which most continuous control benchmarks lack.
abstract_zh: 连续控制域中的实体代理对任务的接触有限，这些任务允许探索肌肉骨骼特性，从而使生物体能够敏捷而敏捷的行为。神经肌肉骨骼控制背后的复杂性可能给运动学习界带来新的挑战。与此同时，解决复杂神经控制问题的代理可以对神经康复和协作机器人等领域产生影响。人体生物力学是复杂的多关节多执行器肌肉骨骼系统的基础。感觉运动系统依赖于一系列丰富的感觉接触和本体感受输入，这些输入定义和调节在物理世界中表现出智能行为所需的肌肉驱动。当前的肌肉骨骼控制框架不支持肌肉骨骼系统的生理复杂性以及物理世界交互能力。此外，它们既不嵌入复杂且熟练的运动任务中，也不具有计算效率和可扩展性来研究大规模学习范式。在这里，我们展示了 MyoSuite——一套生理上准确的肘部、手腕和手的生物力学模型，具有物理接触功能，可以学习复杂且熟练的接触丰富的现实世界任务。我们提供多样化的运动控制挑战：从简单的姿势控制到熟练的手部物体交互，例如转动钥匙、转动笔、一只手旋转两个球等。通过支持肌肉骨骼几何形状（肌腱转移）、辅助设备（外骨骼辅助）和肌肉收缩动力学（肌肉疲劳、肌肉减少症）的生理变化，我们呈现具有时间变化的现实生活任务，从而暴露任务中大多数连续控制基准所缺乏的现实非平稳条件。

AI.tldr: 提出MyoSuite仿真套件，用于解决复杂的肌肉骨骼运动控制问题，支持接触丰富的现实任务学习。
AI.motivation: 现有框架在生理复杂性和物理交互方面不足，无法支持复杂任务及大规模学习，需更真实的仿真环境。
AI.method: 构建包含肘、腕、手的高精度模型，支持生理变化、外骨骼辅助及肌肉疲劳等动态，模拟真实非平稳任务。
AI.result: 实现多种运动控制挑战，涵盖从简单姿势控制到复杂手物交互任务，支持实时非平稳条件测试。
AI.conclusion: MyoSuite弥补现有框架缺陷，为神经康复和协作机器人研究提供有效仿真平台。

authors_text: Selena Ling,Nicholas Sharp,Alec Jacobson
title: VectorAdam for Rotation Equivariant Geometry Optimization
title_zh: 用于旋转等变几何优化的 VectorAdam
abstract: The Adam optimization algorithm has proven remarkably effective for optimization problems across machine learning and even traditional tasks in geometry processing. At the same time, the development of equivariant methods, which preserve their output under the action of rotation or some other transformation, has proven to be important for geometry problems across these domains. In this work, we observe that Adam $-$ when treated as a function that maps initial conditions to optimized results $-$ is not rotation equivariant for vector-valued parameters due to per-coordinate moment updates. This leads to significant artifacts and biases in practice. We propose to resolve this deficiency with VectorAdam, a simple modification which makes Adam rotation-equivariant by accounting for the vector structure of optimization variables. We demonstrate this approach on problems in machine learning and traditional geometric optimization, showing that equivariant VectorAdam resolves the artifacts and biases of traditional Adam when applied to vector-valued data, with equivalent or even improved rates of convergence.
summary: The Adam optimization algorithm has proven remarkably effective for optimization problems across machine learning and even traditional tasks in geometry processing. At the same time, the development of equivariant methods, which preserve their output under the action of rotation or some other transformation, has proven to be important for geometry problems across these domains. In this work, we observe that Adam $-$ when treated as a function that maps initial conditions to optimized results $-$ is not rotation equivariant for vector-valued parameters due to per-coordinate moment updates. This leads to significant artifacts and biases in practice. We propose to resolve this deficiency with VectorAdam, a simple modification which makes Adam rotation-equivariant by accounting for the vector structure of optimization variables. We demonstrate this approach on problems in machine learning and traditional geometric optimization, showing that equivariant VectorAdam resolves the artifacts and biases of traditional Adam when applied to vector-valued data, with equivalent or even improved rates of convergence.
abstract_zh: Adam 优化算法已被证明对于机器学习甚至几何处理中的传统任务的优化问题非常有效。与此同时，等变方法的发展已被证明对于跨这些领域的几何问题非常重要，这些方法在旋转或其他变换的作用下保留其输出。在这项工作中，我们观察到 Adam $-$ 当被视为将初始条件映射到优化结果 $-$ 的函数时，由于每个坐标矩更新，对于向量值参数来说不是旋转等变的。这会导致实践中出现严重的伪影和偏差。我们建议使用 VectorAdam 来解决这一缺陷，这是一种简单的修改，通过考虑优化变量的向量结构使 Adam 旋转等变。我们在机器学习和传统几何优化中的问题上演示了这种方法，表明等变 VectorAdam 在应用于矢量值数据时解决了传统 Adam 的伪影和偏差，具有相同甚至更高的收敛速度。

AI.tldr: 提出VectorAdam算法，解决传统Adam在旋转等变性问题中的不足，用于几何优化。
AI.motivation: 传统Adam优化器在处理向量值参数时因逐坐标更新动量导致旋转等变性不足，产生伪影和偏差，需改进。
AI.method: 通过修改Adam算法，考虑优化变量的向量结构，实现旋转等变性。
AI.result: 在多个几何优化任务中验证，消除传统Adam的伪影和偏差，收敛速度相当或更优。
AI.conclusion: VectorAdam有效解决传统Adam的旋转等变性缺陷，适用于向量值数据的几何优化。

authors_text: Elham Soltanikazemi,Raj S. Roy,Farhan Quadir,Nabin Giri,Alex Morehead,Jianlin Cheng
title: DRLComplex: Reconstruction of protein quaternary structures using deep reinforcement learning
title_zh: DRLComplex：使用深度强化学习重建蛋白质四级结构
abstract: Predicted inter-chain residue-residue contacts can be used to build the quaternary structure of protein complexes from scratch. However, only a small number of methods have been developed to reconstruct protein quaternary structures using predicted inter-chain contacts. Here, we present an agent-based self-learning method based on deep reinforcement learning (DRLComplex) to build protein complex structures using inter-chain contacts as distance constraints. We rigorously tested DRLComplex on two standard datasets of homodimeric and heterodimeric protein complexes (i.e., the CASP-CAPRI homodimer and Std_32 heterodimer datasets) using both true and predicted interchain contacts as inputs. Utilizing true contacts as input, DRLComplex achieved high average TM-scores of 0.9895 and 0.9881 and a low average interface RMSD (I_RMSD) of 0.2197 and 0.92 on the two datasets, respectively. When predicted contacts are used, the method achieves TM-scores of 0.73 and 0.76 for homodimers and heterodimers, respectively. Our experiments find that the accuracy of reconstructed quaternary structures depends on the accuracy of the contact predictions. Compared to other optimization methods for reconstructing quaternary structures from inter-chain contacts, DRLComplex performs similar to an advanced gradient descent method and better than a Markov Chain Monte Carlo simulation method and a simulated annealing-based method, validating the effectiveness of DRLComplex for quaternary reconstruction of protein complexes.
summary: Predicted inter-chain residue-residue contacts can be used to build the quaternary structure of protein complexes from scratch. However, only a small number of methods have been developed to reconstruct protein quaternary structures using predicted inter-chain contacts. Here, we present an agent-based self-learning method based on deep reinforcement learning (DRLComplex) to build protein complex structures using inter-chain contacts as distance constraints. We rigorously tested DRLComplex on two standard datasets of homodimeric and heterodimeric protein complexes (i.e., the CASP-CAPRI homodimer and Std_32 heterodimer datasets) using both true and predicted interchain contacts as inputs. Utilizing true contacts as input, DRLComplex achieved high average TM-scores of 0.9895 and 0.9881 and a low average interface RMSD (I_RMSD) of 0.2197 and 0.92 on the two datasets, respectively. When predicted contacts are used, the method achieves TM-scores of 0.73 and 0.76 for homodimers and heterodimers, respectively. Our experiments find that the accuracy of reconstructed quaternary structures depends on the accuracy of the contact predictions. Compared to other optimization methods for reconstructing quaternary structures from inter-chain contacts, DRLComplex performs similar to an advanced gradient descent method and better than a Markov Chain Monte Carlo simulation method and a simulated annealing-based method, validating the effectiveness of DRLComplex for quaternary reconstruction of protein complexes.
abstract_zh: 预测的链间残基-残基接触可用于从头开始构建蛋白质复合物的四级结构。然而，仅开发了少数方法来利用预测的链间接触来重建蛋白质四级结构。在这里，我们提出了一种基于深度强化学习（DRLComplex）的基于代理的自学习方法，使用链间接触作为距离约束来构建蛋白质复杂结构。我们使用真实的和预测的链间接触作为输入，在同二聚体和异二聚体蛋白质复合物的两个标准数据集（即 CASP-CAPRI 同二聚体和 Std_32 异二聚体数据集）上严格测试了 DRLComplex。利用真实接触作为输入，DRLComplex 在两个数据集上分别实现了 0.9895 和 0.9881 的高平均 TM 分数以及 0.2197 和 0.92 的低平均界面 RMSD (I_RMSD)。当使用预测接触时，该方法对于同二聚体和异二聚体的 TM 分数分别为 0.73 和 0.76。我们的实验发现，重建四元结构的准确性取决于接触预测的准确性。与其他从链间接触重建四元结构的优化方法相比，DRLComplex 的性能类似于先进的梯度下降法，并且优于马尔可夫链蒙特卡罗模拟方法和基于模拟退火的方法，验证了 DRLComplex 对蛋白质复合物四元重建的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度强化学习的方法DRLComplex，用于利用链间残基接触信息从头重建蛋白质四级结构。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在利用预测的链间接触信息重建蛋白质四级结构方面存在局限性，亟需开发更高效的算法。
AI.method: 采用深度强化学习框架，通过自学习代理构建蛋白质复合物结构，以链间接触作为距离约束，并在两个标准数据集上进行验证。
AI.result: 使用真实接触信息时，DRLComplex在两个数据集上的平均TM-score分别达到0.9895和0.9881，界面RMSD分别为0.2197和0.92；使用预测接触时TM-score为0.73和0.76，效果优于部分传统优化方法。
AI.conclusion: DRLComplex在蛋白质四级结构重建中表现有效，其性能依赖于接触预测精度，且优于马尔可夫链蒙特卡洛和模拟退火等方法。

authors_text: Miao Lu,Yifei Min,Zhaoran Wang,Zhuoran Yang
title: Pessimism in the Face of Confounders: Provably Efficient Offline Reinforcement Learning in Partially Observable Markov Decision Processes
title_zh: 面对混杂因素的悲观主义：部分可观察马尔可夫决策过程中可证明有效的离线强化学习
abstract: We study offline reinforcement learning (RL) in partially observable Markov decision processes. In particular, we aim to learn an optimal policy from a dataset collected by a behavior policy which possibly depends on the latent state. Such a dataset is confounded in the sense that the latent state simultaneously affects the action and the observation, which is prohibitive for existing offline RL algorithms. To this end, we propose the \underline{P}roxy variable \underline{P}essimistic \underline{P}olicy \underline{O}ptimization (\texttt{P3O}) algorithm, which addresses the confounding bias and the distributional shift between the optimal and behavior policies in the context of general function approximation. At the core of \texttt{P3O} is a coupled sequence of pessimistic confidence regions constructed via proximal causal inference, which is formulated as minimax estimation. Under a partial coverage assumption on the confounded dataset, we prove that \texttt{P3O} achieves a $n^{-1/2}$-suboptimality, where $n$ is the number of trajectories in the dataset. To our best knowledge, \texttt{P3O} is the first provably efficient offline RL algorithm for POMDPs with a confounded dataset.
summary: We study offline reinforcement learning (RL) in partially observable Markov decision processes. In particular, we aim to learn an optimal policy from a dataset collected by a behavior policy which possibly depends on the latent state. Such a dataset is confounded in the sense that the latent state simultaneously affects the action and the observation, which is prohibitive for existing offline RL algorithms. To this end, we propose the \underline{P}roxy variable \underline{P}essimistic \underline{P}olicy \underline{O}ptimization (\texttt{P3O}) algorithm, which addresses the confounding bias and the distributional shift between the optimal and behavior policies in the context of general function approximation. At the core of \texttt{P3O} is a coupled sequence of pessimistic confidence regions constructed via proximal causal inference, which is formulated as minimax estimation. Under a partial coverage assumption on the confounded dataset, we prove that \texttt{P3O} achieves a $n^{-1/2}$-suboptimality, where $n$ is the number of trajectories in the dataset. To our best knowledge, \texttt{P3O} is the first provably efficient offline RL algorithm for POMDPs with a confounded dataset.
abstract_zh: 我们研究部分可观察马尔可夫决策过程中的离线强化学习（RL）。特别是，我们的目标是从行为策略收集的数据集中学习最优策略，该行为策略可能取决于潜在状态。这样的数据集是令人困惑的，因为潜在状态同时影响动作和观察，这对于现有的离线强化学习算法来说是禁止的。为此，我们提出了 \underline{P}roxy 变量 \underline{P}essimistic \underline{P}olicy \underline{O}ptimization (\texttt{P3O}) 算法，该算法解决了一般函数逼近背景下最优策略和行为策略之间的混杂偏差和分布偏移。 \texttt{P3O} 的核心是通过近端因果推理构建的悲观置信区域的耦合序列，其被表述为极小极大估计。在混杂数据集的部分覆盖假设下，我们证明 \texttt{P3O} 实现了 $n^{-1/2}$ 次优，其中 $n$ 是数据集中的轨迹数量。据我们所知，\texttt{P3O} 是第一个可证明有效的针对具有混杂数据集的 POMDP 的离线强化学习算法。

AI.tldr: 研究部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP）中的离线强化学习问题，目标是从由行为策略收集的混杂数据集中学习最优策略。
AI.motivation: 现有离线强化学习算法无法处理POMDP中由潜在状态同时影响动作和观测所产生的混杂偏差，亟需一种能从混杂数据集中高效学习最优策略的算法。
AI.method: 提出代理变量悲观策略优化（P3O）算法，通过近端因果推断构建耦合的悲观置信区域，并将其表述为极小极大估计问题，同时解决混杂偏差和最优策略与行为策略之间的分布偏移。
AI.result: 在混杂数据集的局部覆盖假设下，证明了P3O算法能够实现n^{-1/2}的次优性（n为轨迹数量），是首个具有理论保证的用于混杂数据集的POMDP离线RL算法。
AI.conclusion: P3O算法首次为POMDP中混杂数据集的离线强化学习提供了可证明的高效解决方案，填补了该领域的理论空白。
