To validate, we extensively compare it with competing metrics using carefully-generated or human-annotated judgments in text-to-image generation and image captioning tasks. The proposed MID significantly outperforms the competitive methods by having consistency across benchmarks, sample parsimony, and robustness toward the exploited CLIP model. We look forward to seeing the underrepresented implications of the Gaussian cross-mutual information in multimodal representation learning and the future works based on this novel proposition. 文本到图像生成和图像字幕最近成为评估机器智能的新实验范式。他们预测连续数量以及一代中的采样技术，使得评估变得复杂且难以获得边际分布。基于多模态生成评估利用视觉和语言预训练模型的最新趋势，我们提出使用 CLIP 特征作为统一度量的负高斯交叉互信息，由互信息散度（MID）创造。为了进行验证，我们在文本到图像生成和图像字幕任务中使用精心生成的或人工注释的判断将其与竞争指标进行广泛比较。所提出的 MID 通过跨基准的一致性、样本简约性以及对所利用的 CLIP 模型的鲁棒性，显着优于竞争方法。我们期待看到高斯交叉互信息在多模态表示学习中未被充分代表的含义以及基于这一新颖命题的未来工作。 本文提出了一种基于CLIP特征的负高斯交叉互信息指标（MID），作为多模态生成模型的统一评估标准，用于解决文本到图像生成和图像描述任务中评估复杂性高的问题。 Jin-Hwa Kim,Yunji Kim,Jiyoung Lee,Kang Min Yoo,Sang-Woo Lee cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.CL,cs.IT,cs.LG

authors_text: Ruili Feng,Jie Xiao,Kecheng Zheng,Deli Zhao,Jingren Zhou,Qibin Sun,Zheng-Jun Zha
title: Principled Knowledge Extrapolation with GANs
title_zh: 使用 GAN 进行原则性知识外推
abstract: Human can extrapolate well, generalize daily knowledge into unseen scenarios, raise and answer counterfactual questions. To imitate this ability via generative models, previous works have extensively studied explicitly encoding Structural Causal Models (SCMs) into architectures of generator networks. This methodology, however, limits the flexibility of the generator as they must be carefully crafted to follow the causal graph, and demands a ground truth SCM with strong ignorability assumption as prior, which is a nontrivial assumption in many real scenarios. Thus, many current causal GAN methods fail to generate high fidelity counterfactual results as they cannot easily leverage state-of-the-art generative models. In this paper, we propose to study counterfactual synthesis from a new perspective of knowledge extrapolation, where a given knowledge dimension of the data distribution is extrapolated, but the remaining knowledge is kept indistinguishable from the original distribution. We show that an adversarial game with a closed-form discriminator can be used to address the knowledge extrapolation problem, and a novel principal knowledge descent method can efficiently estimate the extrapolated distribution through the adversarial game. Our method enjoys both elegant theoretical guarantees and superior performance in many scenarios.
summary: Human can extrapolate well, generalize daily knowledge into unseen scenarios, raise and answer counterfactual questions. To imitate this ability via generative models, previous works have extensively studied explicitly encoding Structural Causal Models (SCMs) into architectures of generator networks. This methodology, however, limits the flexibility of the generator as they must be carefully crafted to follow the causal graph, and demands a ground truth SCM with strong ignorability assumption as prior, which is a nontrivial assumption in many real scenarios. Thus, many current causal GAN methods fail to generate high fidelity counterfactual results as they cannot easily leverage state-of-the-art generative models. In this paper, we propose to study counterfactual synthesis from a new perspective of knowledge extrapolation, where a given knowledge dimension of the data distribution is extrapolated, but the remaining knowledge is kept indistinguishable from the original distribution. We show that an adversarial game with a closed-form discriminator can be used to address the knowledge extrapolation problem, and a novel principal knowledge descent method can efficiently estimate the extrapolated distribution through the adversarial game. Our method enjoys both elegant theoretical guarantees and superior performance in many scenarios.
abstract_zh: 人类可以很好地进行推断，将日常知识归纳到未见过的场景中，提出并回答反事实的问题。为了通过生成模型模仿这种能力，之前的工作已经广泛研究了将结构因果模型（SCM）显式编码到生成器网络架构中。然而，这种方法限制了生成器的灵活性，因为它们必须精心设计以遵循因果图，并且需要像先前一样具有强可忽略性假设的地面实况 SCM，这在许多实际场景中是一个重要的假设。因此，当前的许多因果 GAN 方法无法生成高保真度的反事实结果，因为它们无法轻松利用最先进的生成模型。在本文中，我们建议从知识外推的新角度研究反事实综合，其中外推数据分布的给定知识维度，但其余知识与原始分布保持无法区分。我们证明，具有封闭式判别器的对抗性游戏可用于解决知识外推问题，并且一种新颖的主知识下降方法可以通过对抗性游戏有效地估计外推分布。我们的方法在许多场景下都具有优雅的理论保证和优越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于对抗生成网络（GANs）的知识外推方法，用于生成高质量的反事实数据。
AI.motivation: 现有因果GAN方法在生成反事实结果时存在局限性，因为它们依赖于结构因果模型（SCMs），而这需要强假设且限制了生成器的灵活性。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种新的知识外推视角，通过对抗游戏和闭式判别器解决知识外推问题，并引入了一种新的主知识下降方法来估计外推分布。
AI.result: 该方法在理论保证和多个场景中的性能表现均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文的方法在生成高质量反事实数据方面具有潜力，并为因果生成模型提供了一种新的思路。

authors_text: Lingfeng Tao,Jiucai Zhang,Xiaoli Zhang
title: Multi-Phase Multi-Objective Dexterous Manipulation with Adaptive Hierarchical Curriculum
title_zh: 具有自适应分层课程的多阶段多目标灵巧操作
comment: Accepted by the Journal of Intelligent & Robotic Systems
comments: Accepted by the Journal of Intelligent & Robotic Systems
abstract: Dexterous manipulation tasks usually have multiple objectives, and the priorities of these objectives may vary at different phases of a manipulation task. Varying priority makes a robot hardly or even failed to learn an optimal policy with a deep reinforcement learning (DRL) method. To solve this problem, we develop a novel Adaptive Hierarchical Reward Mechanism (AHRM) to guide the DRL agent to learn manipulation tasks with multiple prioritized objectives. The AHRM can determine the objective priorities during the learning process and update the reward hierarchy to adapt to the changing objective priorities at different phases. The proposed method is validated in a multi-objective manipulation task with a JACO robot arm in which the robot needs to manipulate a target with obstacles surrounded. The simulation and physical experiment results show that the proposed method improved robot learning in task performance and learning efficiency.
summary: Dexterous manipulation tasks usually have multiple objectives, and the priorities of these objectives may vary at different phases of a manipulation task. Varying priority makes a robot hardly or even failed to learn an optimal policy with a deep reinforcement learning (DRL) method. To solve this problem, we develop a novel Adaptive Hierarchical Reward Mechanism (AHRM) to guide the DRL agent to learn manipulation tasks with multiple prioritized objectives. The AHRM can determine the objective priorities during the learning process and update the reward hierarchy to adapt to the changing objective priorities at different phases. The proposed method is validated in a multi-objective manipulation task with a JACO robot arm in which the robot needs to manipulate a target with obstacles surrounded. The simulation and physical experiment results show that the proposed method improved robot learning in task performance and learning efficiency.
abstract_zh: 灵巧操作任务通常有多个目标，并且这些目标的优先级在操作任务的不同阶段可能会有所不同。不同的优先级使得机器人很难甚至无法通过深度强化学习（DRL）方法学习最优策略。为了解决这个问题，我们开发了一种新颖的自适应分层奖励机制（AHRM）来指导 DRL 代理学习具有多个优先目标的操作任务。 AHRM可以确定学习过程中的目标优先级，并更新奖励层次结构以适应不同阶段不断变化的目标优先级。所提出的方法在 JACO 机器人手臂的多目标操纵任务中得到了验证，其中机器人需要操纵周围有障碍物的目标。仿真和物理实验结果表明，该方法提高了机器人学习的任务表现和学习效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自适应分层奖励机制（AHRM），解决多阶段多目标灵巧操作任务中目标优先级动态变化导致的深度强化学习（DRL）效率低下问题。
AI.motivation: 传统DRL方法难以处理操作任务不同阶段目标优先级变化的问题，导致机器人学习效果差或失败。
AI.method: 开发自适应分层奖励机制（AHRM），通过动态调整奖励层级以适应任务不同阶段的目标优先级变化。
AI.result: 在JACO机械臂的多目标操作任务中，仿真与物理实验表明该方法提升了任务性能和学习效率。
AI.conclusion: AHRM有效解决了多阶段多目标任务中目标优先级动态调整的难题，增强了机器人学习的适应性与效率。

authors_text: Robert Lizée
title: The Neuro-Symbolic Brain
title_zh: 神经符号脑
abstract: Neural networks promote a distributed representation with no clear place for symbols. Despite this, we propose that symbols are manufactured simply by training a sparse random noise as a self-sustaining attractor in a feedback spiking neural network. This way, we can generate many of what we shall call prime attractors, and the networks that support them are like registers holding a symbolic value, and we call them registers. Like symbols, prime attractors are atomic and devoid of any internal structure. Moreover, the winner-take-all mechanism naturally implemented by spiking neurons enables registers to recover a prime attractor within a noisy signal. Using this faculty, when considering two connected registers, an input one and an output one, it is possible to bind in one shot using a Hebbian rule the attractor active on the output to the attractor active on the input. Thus, whenever an attractor is active on the input, it induces its bound attractor on the output; even though the signal gets blurrier with more bindings, the winner-take-all filtering faculty can recover the bound prime attractor. However, the capacity is still limited. It is also possible to unbind in one shot, restoring the capacity taken by that binding. This mechanism serves as a basis for working memory, turning prime attractors into variables. Also, we use a random second-order network to amalgamate the prime attractors held by two registers to bind the prime attractor held by a third register to them in one shot, de facto implementing a hash table. Furthermore, we introduce the register switch box composed of registers to move the content of one register to another. Then, we use spiking neurons to build a toy symbolic computer based on the above. The technics used suggest ways to design extrapolating, reusable, sample-efficient deep learning networks at the cost of structural priors.

Then, we use spiking neurons to build a toy symbolic computer based on the above. The technics used suggest ways to design extrapolating, reusable, sample-efficient deep learning networks at the cost of structural priors.
abstract_zh: 神经网络促进分布式表示，没有明确的符号位置。尽管如此，我们建议简单地通过训练稀疏随机噪声作为反馈尖峰神经网络中的自维持吸引子来制造符号。通过这种方式，我们可以生成许多我们称之为素吸引子的东西，而支持它们的网络就像保存符号值的寄存器，我们称之为寄存器。与符号一样，素吸引子也是原子的，没有任何内部结构。此外，由尖峰神经元自然实现的赢家通吃机制使寄存器能够在噪声信号中恢复主要吸引子。利用这一能力，当考虑两个连接的寄存器（输入寄存器和输出寄存器）时，可以使用赫布规则一次性将输出上活跃的吸引子绑定到输入上活跃的吸引子。因此，每当吸引子在输入上处于活动状态时，它就会在输出上感应出其束缚吸引子。即使信号随着更多的结合而变得模糊，赢者通吃的过滤能力也可以恢复结合的素吸引子。然而，容量仍然有限。也可以一键解除绑定，恢复绑定所占用的容量。这种机制是工作记忆的基础，将主要吸引子转化为变量。此外，我们使用随机二阶网络来合并两个寄存器所持有的素吸引子，从而将第三个寄存器所持有的素吸引子一次性绑定到它们，实际上实现了一个哈希表。此外，我们还引入了由寄存器组成的寄存器切换盒，用于将一个寄存器的内容移动到另一个寄存器。然后，我们使用尖峰神经元构建了一个基于上述的玩具符号计算机。所使用的技术提出了以结构先验为代价来设计外推、可重用、样本高效的深度学习网络的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种神经符号系统，通过脉冲神经网络生成符号吸引子并构建寄存器，实现符号绑定、解绑及工作记忆功能，最终构建出玩具级符号计算机。
AI.motivation: 传统神经网络缺乏明确符号表示，而符号系统难以处理复杂数据，需融合两者优势以实现可解释且高效的计算模型。
AI.method: 利用反馈脉冲神经网络训练稀疏噪声生成原子吸引子（prime attractors），通过赢家通吃机制实现噪声中恢复，并采用赫布规则进行绑定/解绑操作，结合二阶网络与寄存器切换盒构建符号计算机。
AI.result: 成功实现寄存器存储、单次绑定/解绑、工作记忆及哈希表结构，验证了符号与神经机制融合的可行性，展示了结构先验下高效学习的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为神经符号系统提供基础框架，可能推动可解释AI发展，但需解决容量限制与扩展性问题。

search_text: The Neuro-Symbolic Brain 神经符号脑 Neural networks promote a distributed representation with no clear place for symbols. Despite this, we propose that symbols are manufactured simply by training a sparse random noise as a self-sustaining attractor in a feedback spiking neural network. This way, we can generate many of what we shall call prime attractors, and the networks that support them are like registers holding a symbolic value, and we call them registers. Like symbols, prime attractors are atomic and devoid of any internal structure. Moreover, the winner-take-all mechanism naturally implemented by spiking neurons enables registers to recover a prime attractor within a noisy signal. Using this faculty, when considering two connected registers, an input one and an output one, it is possible to bind in one shot using a Hebbian rule the attractor active on the output to the attractor active on the input. Thus, whenever an attractor is active on the input, it induces its bound attractor on the output; even though the signal gets blurrier with more bindings, the winner-take-all filtering faculty can recover the bound prime attractor. However, the capacity is still limited. It is also possible to unbind in one shot, restoring the capacity taken by that binding. This mechanism serves as a basis for working memory, turning prime attractors into variables. Also, we use a random second-order network to amalgamate the prime attractors held by two registers to bind the prime attractor held by a third register to them in one shot, de facto implementing a hash table. Furthermore, we introduce the register switch box composed of registers to move the content of one register to another. Then, we use spiking neurons to build a toy symbolic computer based on the above. The technics used suggest ways to design extrapolating, reusable, sample-efficient deep learning networks at the cost of structural priors. 神经网络促进分布式表示，没有明确的符号位置。尽管如此，我们建议简单地通过训练稀疏随机噪声作为反馈尖峰神经网络中的自维持吸引子来制造符号。通过这种方式，我们可以生成许多我们称之为素吸引子的东西，而支持它们的网络就像保存符号值的寄存器，我们称之为寄存器。与符号一样，素吸引子也是原子的，没有任何内部结构。此外，由尖峰神经元自然实现的赢家通吃机制使寄存器能够在噪声信号中恢复主要吸引子。利用这一能力，当考虑两个连接的寄存器（输入寄存器和输出寄存器）时，可以使用赫布规则一次性将输出上活跃的吸引子绑定到输入上活跃的吸引子。因此，每当吸引子在输入上处于活动状态时，它就会在输出上感应出其束缚吸引子。即使信号随着更多的结合而变得模糊，赢者通吃的过滤能力也可以恢复结合的素吸引子。然而，容量仍然有限。也可以一键解除绑定，恢复绑定所占用的容量。这种机制是工作记忆的基础，将主要吸引子转化为变量。此外，我们使用随机二阶网络来合并两个寄存器所持有的素吸引子，从而将第三个寄存器所持有的素吸引子一次性绑定到它们，实际上实现了一个哈希表。此外，我们还引入了由寄存器组成的寄存器切换盒，用于将一个寄存器的内容移动到另一个寄存器。然后，我们使用尖峰神经元构建了一个基于上述的玩具符号计算机。所使用的技术提出了以结构先验为代价来设计外推、可重用、样本高效的深度学习网络的方法。 本文提出一种神经符号系统，通过脉冲神经网络生成符号吸引子并构建寄存器，实现符号绑定、解绑及工作记忆功能，最终构建出玩具级符号计算机。 Robert Lizée cs.NE,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Nguyen Hong Son,Hieu M. Vu,Tuan-Anh D. Nguyen,Minh-Tien Nguyen
title: Jointly Learning Span Extraction and Sequence Labeling for Information Extraction from Business Documents
title_zh: 联合学习跨度提取和序列标记从业务文档中提取信息
abstract: This paper introduces a new information extraction model for business documents. Different from prior studies which only base on span extraction or sequence labeling, the model takes into account advantage of both span extraction and sequence labeling. The combination allows the model to deal with long documents with sparse information (the small amount of extracted information). The model is trained end-to-end to jointly optimize the two tasks in a unified manner. Experimental results on four business datasets in English and Japanese show that the model achieves promising results and is significantly faster than the normal span-based extraction method. The code is also available.
summary: This paper introduces a new information extraction model for business documents. Different from prior studies which only base on span extraction or sequence labeling, the model takes into account advantage of both span extraction and sequence labeling. The combination allows the model to deal with long documents with sparse information (the small amount of extracted information). The model is trained end-to-end to jointly optimize the two tasks in a unified manner. Experimental results on four business datasets in English and Japanese show that the model achieves promising results and is significantly faster than the normal span-based extraction method. The code is also available.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了一种新的商业文档信息提取模型。与以往仅基于跨度提取或序列标记的研究不同，该模型兼顾了跨度提取和序列标记的优点。这种组合允许模型处理具有稀疏信息（少量提取信息）的长文档。该模型经过端到端训练，以统一的方式联合优化这两个任务。在英语和日语的四个业务数据集上的实验结果表明，该模型取得了可喜的结果，并且比普通的基于跨度的提取方法要快得多。该代码也可用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合跨度提取与序列标注的信息提取模型，用于处理商业文档中的信息抽取任务。
AI.motivation: 传统方法仅依赖跨度提取或序列标注，难以有效处理长文档中稀疏信息的提取问题。
AI.method: 设计端到端联合优化框架，同时学习跨度提取与序列标注任务，统一处理两种信息表示方式。
AI.result: 在四个英日商业数据集上取得显著效果，且推理速度明显优于传统跨度提取方法。
AI.conclusion: 联合学习方法能更高效处理商业文档中的信息提取，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Dazhao Du,Bing Su,Yu Li,Zhongang Qi,Lingyu Si,Ying Shan
title: Do we really need temporal convolutions in action segmentation?
title_zh: 在动作分割中我们真的需要时间卷积吗？
abstract: Action classification has made great progress, but segmenting and recognizing actions from long untrimmed videos remains a challenging problem. Most state-of-the-art methods focus on designing temporal convolution-based models, but the inflexibility of temporal convolutions and the difficulties in modeling long-term temporal dependencies restrict the potential of these models. Transformer-based models with adaptable and sequence modeling capabilities have recently been used in various tasks. However, the lack of inductive bias and the inefficiency of handling long video sequences limit the application of Transformer in action segmentation. In this paper, we design a pure Transformer-based model without temporal convolutions by incorporating temporal sampling, called Temporal U-Transformer (TUT). The U-Transformer architecture reduces complexity while introducing an inductive bias that adjacent frames are more likely to belong to the same class, but the introduction of coarse resolutions results in the misclassification of boundaries. We observe that the similarity distribution between a boundary frame and its neighboring frames depends on whether the boundary frame is the start or end of an action segment. Therefore, we further propose a boundary-aware loss based on the distribution of similarity scores between frames from attention modules to enhance the ability to recognize boundaries. Extensive experiments show the effectiveness of our model.
summary: Action classification has made great progress, but segmenting and recognizing actions from long untrimmed videos remains a challenging problem. Most state-of-the-art methods focus on designing temporal convolution-based models, but the inflexibility of temporal convolutions and the difficulties in modeling long-term temporal dependencies restrict the potential of these models. Transformer-based models with adaptable and sequence modeling capabilities have recently been used in various tasks. However, the lack of inductive bias and the inefficiency of handling long video sequences limit the application of Transformer in action segmentation. In this paper, we design a pure Transformer-based model without temporal convolutions by incorporating temporal sampling, called Temporal U-Transformer (TUT). The U-Transformer architecture reduces complexity while introducing an inductive bias that adjacent frames are more likely to belong to the same class, but the introduction of coarse resolutions results in the misclassification of boundaries. We observe that the similarity distribution between a boundary frame and its neighboring frames depends on whether the boundary frame is the start or end of an action segment. Therefore, we further propose a boundary-aware loss based on the distribution of similarity scores between frames from attention modules to enhance the ability to recognize boundaries. Extensive experiments show the effectiveness of our model.
abstract_zh: 动作分类已经取得了很大的进步，但是从未修剪的长视频中分割和识别动作仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题。大多数最先进的方法都专注于设计基于时间卷积的模型，但时间卷积的不灵活性和长期时间依赖性建模的困难限制了这些模型的潜力。具有适应性和序列建模功能的基于 Transformer 的模型最近已被用于各种任务中。然而，归纳偏差的缺乏以及处理长视频序列的低效率限制了 Transformer 在动作分割中的应用。在本文中，我们通过结合时间采样设计了一个纯基于 Transformer 的模型，没有时间卷积，称为时间 U-Transformer (TUT)。 U-Transformer 架构降低了复杂性，同时引入了一种归纳偏差，即相邻帧更有可能属于同一类，但粗分辨率的引入会导致边界错误分类。我们观察到，边界帧与其相邻帧之间的相似度分布取决于边界帧是动作片段的开始还是结束。因此，我们进一步提出了一种基于注意力模块帧之间相似度分数分布的边界感知损失，以增强识别边界的能力。大量的实验证明了我们模型的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在动作分割任务中是否需要时间卷积，并提出一种基于Transformer的替代方法。
AI.motivation: 现有时间卷积模型存在灵活性不足及长期依赖建模困难，而Transformer虽具潜力但缺乏归纳偏置且处理长视频效率低。
AI.method: 设计纯Transformer模型Temporal U-Transformer（TUT），结合时间采样与边界感知损失以优化边界识别。
AI.result: 实验表明该模型在动作分割任务中表现有效。
AI.conclusion: 纯Transformer架构结合边界感知损失可有效替代时间卷积实现动作分割。

motivation: 现有时间卷积模型存在灵活性不足及长期依赖建模困难，而Transformer虽具潜力但缺乏归纳偏置且处理长视频效率低。
method: 设计纯Transformer模型Temporal U-Transformer（TUT），结合时间采样与边界感知损失以优化边界识别。
result: 实验表明该模型在动作分割任务中表现有效。
conclusion: 纯Transformer架构结合边界感知损失可有效替代时间卷积实现动作分割。
search_text: Do we really need temporal convolutions in action segmentation? 在动作分割中我们真的需要时间卷积吗？ Action classification has made great progress, but segmenting and recognizing actions from long untrimmed videos remains a challenging problem. Most state-of-the-art methods focus on designing temporal convolution-based models, but the inflexibility of temporal convolutions and the difficulties in modeling long-term temporal dependencies restrict the potential of these models. Transformer-based models with adaptable and sequence modeling capabilities have recently been used in various tasks. However, the lack of inductive bias and the inefficiency of handling long video sequences limit the application of Transformer in action segmentation. In this paper, we design a pure Transformer-based model without temporal convolutions by incorporating temporal sampling, called Temporal U-Transformer (TUT). The U-Transformer architecture reduces complexity while introducing an inductive bias that adjacent frames are more likely to belong to the same class, but the introduction of coarse resolutions results in the misclassification of boundaries. We observe that the similarity distribution between a boundary frame and its neighboring frames depends on whether the boundary frame is the start or end of an action segment. Therefore, we further propose a boundary-aware loss based on the distribution of similarity scores between frames from attention modules to enhance the ability to recognize boundaries. Extensive experiments show the effectiveness of our model. 动作分类已经取得了很大的进步，但是从未修剪的长视频中分割和识别动作仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题。大多数最先进的方法都专注于设计基于时间卷积的模型，但时间卷积的不灵活性和长期时间依赖性建模的困难限制了这些模型的潜力。具有适应性和序列建模功能的基于 Transformer 的模型最近已被用于各种任务中。然而，归纳偏差的缺乏以及处理长视频序列的低效率限制了 Transformer 在动作分割中的应用。在本文中，我们通过结合时间采样设计了一个纯基于 Transformer 的模型，没有时间卷积，称为时间 U-Transformer (TUT)。 U-Transformer 架构降低了复杂性，同时引入了一种归纳偏差，即相邻帧更有可能属于同一类，但粗分辨率的引入会导致边界错误分类。我们观察到，边界帧与其相邻帧之间的相似度分布取决于边界帧是动作片段的开始还是结束。因此，我们进一步提出了一种基于注意力模块帧之间相似度分数分布的边界感知损失，以增强识别边界的能力。大量的实验证明了我们模型的有效性。 本文研究在动作分割任务中是否需要时间卷积，并提出一种基于Transformer的替代方法。 Dazhao Du,Bing Su,Yu Li,Zhongang Qi,Lingyu Si,Ying Shan cs.CV

authors_text: Kiril Danilchenko,Michael Segal,Dan Vilenchik
title: Opinion Spam Detection: A New Approach Using Machine Learning and Network-Based Algorithms
title_zh: 意见垃圾邮件检测：一种使用机器学习和基于网络的算法的新方法
abstract: E-commerce is the fastest-growing segment of the economy. Online reviews play a crucial role in helping consumers evaluate and compare products and services. As a result, fake reviews (opinion spam) are becoming more prevalent and negatively impacting customers and service providers. There are many reasons why it is hard to identify opinion spammers automatically, including the absence of reliable labeled data. This limitation precludes an off-the-shelf application of a machine learning pipeline. We propose a new method for classifying reviewers as spammers or benign, combining machine learning with a message-passing algorithm that capitalizes on the users' graph structure to compensate for the possible scarcity of labeled data. We devise a new way of sampling the labels for the training step (active learning), replacing the typical uniform sampling. Experiments on three large real-world datasets from Yelp.com show that our method outperforms state-of-the-art active learning approaches and also machine learning methods that use a much larger set of labeled data for training.
summary: E-commerce is the fastest-growing segment of the economy. Online reviews play a crucial role in helping consumers evaluate and compare products and services. As a result, fake reviews (opinion spam) are becoming more prevalent and negatively impacting customers and service providers. There are many reasons why it is hard to identify opinion spammers automatically, including the absence of reliable labeled data. This limitation precludes an off-the-shelf application of a machine learning pipeline. We propose a new method for classifying reviewers as spammers or benign, combining machine learning with a message-passing algorithm that capitalizes on the users' graph structure to compensate for the possible scarcity of labeled data. We devise a new way of sampling the labels for the training step (active learning), replacing the typical uniform sampling. Experiments on three large real-world datasets from Yelp.com show that our method outperforms state-of-the-art active learning approaches and also machine learning methods that use a much larger set of labeled data for training.
abstract_zh: 电子商务是经济增长最快的部分。在线评论在帮助消费者评估和比较产品和服务方面发挥着至关重要的作用。因此，虚假评论（垃圾意见）变得越来越普遍，并对客户和服务提供商产生负面影响。难以自动识别垃圾评论发送者的原因有很多，其中包括缺乏可靠的标记数据。这种限制阻碍了机器学习管道的现成应用。我们提出了一种将评论者分类为垃圾邮件发送者或良性评论者的新方法，将机器学习与消息传递算法相结合，利用用户的图结构来弥补标记数据可能的稀缺性。我们设计了一种对训练步骤（主动学习）的标签进行采样的新方法，取代了典型的均匀采样。对 Yelp.com 的三个大型现实数据集进行的实验表明，我们的方法优于最先进的主动学习方法以及使用更大的标记数据集进行训练的机器学习方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合机器学习与网络算法的新方法，用于在标记数据有限的情况下检测电商平台上的虚假评论（意见垃圾邮件）。
AI.motivation: 由于虚假评论（意见垃圾邮件）对消费者和服务提供商造成负面影响，而现有方法因依赖大量标记数据而难以有效应用，因此需要一种能在标记数据稀缺情况下自动识别虚假评论的新方法。
AI.method: 提出结合机器学习与基于用户关系网络的消息传递算法，通过主动学习策略优化标签采样过程，利用用户图结构补偿标记数据不足的问题。
AI.result: 在Yelp三个真实数据集上的实验表明，该方法在标记数据较少的情况下，检测效果优于现有主动学习方法及使用更多标记数据的机器学习模型。
AI.conclusion: 本研究验证了结合网络结构与主动学习的机器学习方法在虚假评论检测中的有效性，为解决标记数据稀缺场景下的意见垃圾邮件识别问题提供了新思路。

authors_text: Rongguang Wang,Pratik Chaudhari,Christos Davatzikos
title: Bias in Machine Learning Models Can Be Significantly Mitigated by Careful Training: Evidence from Neuroimaging Studies
title_zh: 通过仔细的训练可以显着减轻机器学习模型的偏差：来自神经影像学研究的证据
comment: ef:Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences 120.6 (2023)
comments: ef:Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences 120.6 (2023)
abstract: Despite the great promise that machine learning has offered in many fields of medicine, it has also raised concerns about potential biases and poor generalization across genders, age distributions, races and ethnicities, hospitals, and data acquisition equipment and protocols. In the current study, and in the context of three brain diseases, we provide evidence which suggests that when properly trained, machine learning models can generalize well across diverse conditions and do not necessarily suffer from bias. Specifically, by using multi-study magnetic resonance imaging consortia for diagnosing Alzheimer's disease, schizophrenia, and autism spectrum disorder, we find that well-trained models have a high area-under-the-curve (AUC) on subjects across different subgroups pertaining to attributes such as gender, age, racial groups, and different clinical studies and are unbiased under multiple fairness metrics such as demographic parity difference, equalized odds difference, equal opportunity difference etc. We find that models that incorporate multi-source data from demographic, clinical, genetic factors and cognitive scores are also unbiased. These models have better predictive AUC across subgroups than those trained only with imaging features but there are also situations when these additional features do not help.
summary: Despite the great promise that machine learning has offered in many fields of medicine, it has also raised concerns about potential biases and poor generalization across genders, age distributions, races and ethnicities, hospitals, and data acquisition equipment and protocols. In the current study, and in the context of three brain diseases, we provide evidence which suggests that when properly trained, machine learning models can generalize well across diverse conditions and do not necessarily suffer from bias. Specifically, by using multi-study magnetic resonance imaging consortia for diagnosing Alzheimer's disease, schizophrenia, and autism spectrum disorder, we find that well-trained models have a high area-under-the-curve (AUC) on subjects across different subgroups pertaining to attributes such as gender, age, racial groups, and different clinical studies and are unbiased under multiple fairness metrics such as demographic parity difference, equalized odds difference, equal opportunity difference etc. We find that models that incorporate multi-source data from demographic, clinical, genetic factors and cognitive scores are also unbiased. These models have better predictive AUC across subgroups than those trained only with imaging features but there are also situations when these additional features do not help.
abstract_zh: 尽管机器学习在许多医学领域带来了巨大的希望，但它也引发了人们对性别、年龄分布、种族和民族、医院以及数据采集设备和协议方面的潜在偏见和普遍性较差的担忧。在当前的研究中，在三种脑部疾病的背景下，我们提供的证据表明，经过适当的训练，机器学习模型可以在不同的条件下很好地泛化，并且不一定会出现偏差。具体来说，通过使用多研究磁共振成像联盟来诊断阿尔茨海默病、精神分裂症和自闭症谱系障碍，我们发现训练有素的模型对不同亚组的受试者具有较高的曲线下面积（AUC），这些受试者涉及性别、年龄、种族群体和不同的临床研究等属性，并且在多种公平性指标（例如人口统计差异、均等比值差异、均等机会差异）下没有偏见我们发现，整合了人口统计、临床、遗传因素和认知评分等多源数据的模型也是公正的。这些模型比仅使用成像特征训练的模型具有更好的跨亚组预测 AUC，但也存在这些附加特征没有帮助的情况。

AI.tldr: 论文通过神经影像学研究证明，经过精心训练的机器学习模型可有效减少偏差并在不同子群体中实现良好泛化。
AI.motivation: 机器学习在医学领域应用广泛，但存在跨性别、年龄、种族等群体的偏差和泛化能力不足问题，需验证模型训练方法对缓解偏差的有效性。
AI.method: 利用多中心MRI数据集（阿尔茨海默病、精神分裂症、自闭症），训练并评估模型在不同子群体的AUC值及公平性指标（如人口统计公平性差异），对比仅使用影像特征与结合多源数据（人口统计、基因等）的模型表现。
AI.result: 精心训练的模型在跨性别、年龄、种族等子群体中保持高AUC且符合公平性标准，结合多源数据的模型预测性能更优，但部分情况下额外特征无显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过优化训练策略可显著缓解机器学习模型偏差，但需根据具体任务选择特征组合以实现最佳泛化效果。

In the current study, and in the context of three brain diseases, we provide evidence which suggests that when properly trained, machine learning models can generalize well across diverse conditions and do not necessarily suffer from bias. Specifically, by using multi-study magnetic resonance imaging consortia for diagnosing Alzheimer's disease, schizophrenia, and autism spectrum disorder, we find that well-trained models have a high area-under-the-curve (AUC) on subjects across different subgroups pertaining to attributes such as gender, age, racial groups, and different clinical studies and are unbiased under multiple fairness metrics such as demographic parity difference, equalized odds difference, equal opportunity difference etc. We find that models that incorporate multi-source data from demographic, clinical, genetic factors and cognitive scores are also unbiased. These models have better predictive AUC across subgroups than those trained only with imaging features but there are also situations when these additional features do not help. 尽管机器学习在许多医学领域带来了巨大的希望，但它也引发了人们对性别、年龄分布、种族和民族、医院以及数据采集设备和协议方面的潜在偏见和普遍性较差的担忧。在当前的研究中，在三种脑部疾病的背景下，我们提供的证据表明，经过适当的训练，机器学习模型可以在不同的条件下很好地泛化，并且不一定会出现偏差。具体来说，通过使用多研究磁共振成像联盟来诊断阿尔茨海默病、精神分裂症和自闭症谱系障碍，我们发现训练有素的模型对不同亚组的受试者具有较高的曲线下面积（AUC），这些受试者涉及性别、年龄、种族群体和不同的临床研究等属性，并且在多种公平性指标（例如人口统计差异、均等比值差异、均等机会差异）下没有偏见我们发现，整合了人口统计、临床、遗传因素和认知评分等多源数据的模型也是公正的。这些模型比仅使用成像特征训练的模型具有更好的跨亚组预测 AUC，但也存在这些附加特征没有帮助的情况。 论文通过神经影像学研究证明，经过精心训练的机器学习模型可有效减少偏差并在不同子群体中实现良好泛化。 Rongguang Wang,Pratik Chaudhari,Christos Davatzikos cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Lucas Friedrich,Jonas Maziero
title: Avoiding Barren Plateaus with Classical Deep Neural Networks
title_zh: 用经典深度神经网络避免贫瘠高原
abstract: Variational quantum algorithms (VQAs) are among the most promising algorithms in the era of Noisy Intermediate Scale Quantum Devices. Such algorithms are constructed using a parameterization U($\pmbθ$) with a classical optimizer that updates the parameters $\pmbθ$ in order to minimize a cost function $C$. For this task, in general the gradient descent method, or one of its variants, is used. This is a method where the circuit parameters are updated iteratively using the cost function gradient. However, several works in the literature have shown that this method suffers from a phenomenon known as the Barren Plateaus (BP). In this work, we propose a new method to mitigate BPs. In general, the parameters $\pmbθ$ used in the parameterization $U$ are randomly generated. In our method they are obtained from a classical neural network (CNN). We show that this method, besides to being able to mitigate BPs during startup, is also able to mitigate the effect of BPs during the VQA training. In addition, we also show how this method behaves for different CNN architectures.
summary: Variational quantum algorithms (VQAs) are among the most promising algorithms in the era of Noisy Intermediate Scale Quantum Devices. Such algorithms are constructed using a parameterization U($\pmbθ$) with a classical optimizer that updates the parameters $\pmbθ$ in order to minimize a cost function $C$. For this task, in general the gradient descent method, or one of its variants, is used. This is a method where the circuit parameters are updated iteratively using the cost function gradient. However, several works in the literature have shown that this method suffers from a phenomenon known as the Barren Plateaus (BP). In this work, we propose a new method to mitigate BPs. In general, the parameters $\pmbθ$ used in the parameterization $U$ are randomly generated. In our method they are obtained from a classical neural network (CNN). We show that this method, besides to being able to mitigate BPs during startup, is also able to mitigate the effect of BPs during the VQA training. In addition, we also show how this method behaves for different CNN architectures.
abstract_zh: 变分量子算法（VQA）是嘈杂的中尺度量子器件时代最有前途的算法之一。此类算法是使用参数化 U($\pmbθ$) 和经典优化器构建的，该优化器更新参数 $\pmbθ$ 以最小化成本函数 $C$。对于此任务，通常使用梯度下降法或其变体之一。这是一种使用成本函数梯度迭代更新电路参数的方法。然而，文献中的一些著作表明，这种方法会遇到一种称为“贫瘠高原”(BP) 的现象。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种减轻 BP 的新方法。一般来说，参数化$U$中使用的参数$\pmbθ$是随机生成的。在我们的方法中，它们是从经典神经网络（CNN）获得的。我们表明，这种方法除了能够减轻启动期间的 BP 之外，还能够减轻 VQA 训练期间 BP 的影响。此外，我们还展示了该方法在不同 CNN 架构中的表现。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用经典卷积神经网络（CNN）生成参数以缓解变分量子算法（VQA）中的 barren plateaus 问题。
AI.motivation: 变分量子算法在训练过程中易受 barren plateaus 影响，导致梯度消失，而传统随机参数初始化方法难以有效缓解此问题。
AI.method: 通过经典卷积神经网络生成量子电路参数，替代传统随机初始化方法，并验证不同CNN架构对此方法的影响。
AI.result: 该方法在训练初期和中期均能有效抑制 barren plateaus，且适用于多种CNN架构。
AI.conclusion: 利用经典深度神经网络生成参数可为VQA提供更稳定的训练过程，为量子算法优化提供新思路。

authors_text: Yanjie Li,Yiquan Li,Xuelong Dai,Songtao Guo,Bin Xiao
title: Physical-World Optical Adversarial Attacks on 3D Face Recognition
title_zh: 物理世界对 3D 人脸识别的光学对抗攻击
abstract: 2D face recognition has been proven insecure for physical adversarial attacks. However, few studies have investigated the possibility of attacking real-world 3D face recognition systems. 3D-printed attacks recently proposed cannot generate adversarial points in the air. In this paper, we attack 3D face recognition systems through elaborate optical noises. We took structured light 3D scanners as our attack target. End-to-end attack algorithms are designed to generate adversarial illumination for 3D faces through the inherent or an additional projector to produce adversarial points at arbitrary positions. Nevertheless, face reflectance is a complex procedure because the skin is translucent. To involve this projection-and-capture procedure in optimization loops, we model it by Lambertian rendering model and use SfSNet to estimate the albedo. Moreover, to improve the resistance to distance and angle changes while maintaining the perturbation unnoticeable, a 3D transform invariant loss and two kinds of sensitivity maps are introduced. Experiments are conducted in both simulated and physical worlds. We successfully attacked point-cloud-based and depth-image-based 3D face recognition algorithms while needing fewer perturbations than previous state-of-the-art physical-world 3D adversarial attacks.
summary: 2D face recognition has been proven insecure for physical adversarial attacks. However, few studies have investigated the possibility of attacking real-world 3D face recognition systems. 3D-printed attacks recently proposed cannot generate adversarial points in the air. In this paper, we attack 3D face recognition systems through elaborate optical noises. We took structured light 3D scanners as our attack target. End-to-end attack algorithms are designed to generate adversarial illumination for 3D faces through the inherent or an additional projector to produce adversarial points at arbitrary positions. Nevertheless, face reflectance is a complex procedure because the skin is translucent. To involve this projection-and-capture procedure in optimization loops, we model it by Lambertian rendering model and use SfSNet to estimate the albedo. Moreover, to improve the resistance to distance and angle changes while maintaining the perturbation unnoticeable, a 3D transform invariant loss and two kinds of sensitivity maps are introduced. Experiments are conducted in both simulated and physical worlds. We successfully attacked point-cloud-based and depth-image-based 3D face recognition algorithms while needing fewer perturbations than previous state-of-the-art physical-world 3D adversarial attacks.
abstract_zh: 事实证明，二维人脸识别对于物理对抗攻击来说是不安全的。然而，很少有研究调查攻击现实世界 3D 人脸识别系统的可能性。最近提出的 3D 打印攻击无法在空中产生对抗点。在本文中，我们通过精心设计的光学噪声攻击 3D 人脸识别系统。我们将结构光 3D 扫描仪作为我们的攻击目标。端到端攻击算法旨在通过固有或附加投影仪生成 3D 人脸的对抗性照明，以在任意位置产生对抗点。然而，面部反射是一个复杂的过程，因为皮肤是半透明的。为了将这个投影和捕获过程纳入优化循环中，我们通过朗伯渲染模型对其进行建模，并使用 SfSNet 来估计反照率。此外，为了提高对距离和角度变化的抵抗力，同时保持扰动不明显，引入了3D变换不变损失和两种灵敏度图。实验在模拟世界和物理世界中进行。我们成功地攻击了基于点云和基于深度图像的 3D 人脸识别算法，同时比以前最先进的物理世界 3D 对抗攻击需要更少的扰动。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对物理世界3D人脸识别系统的光学对抗攻击方法，通过生成特定光照噪声实现攻击。
AI.motivation: 尽管2D人脸识别已被证明存在物理对抗攻击漏洞，但针对真实3D人脸识别系统的攻击研究仍较少，且现有3D打印攻击无法在空气中生成对抗点。
AI.method: 以结构光3D扫描仪为攻击目标，设计端到端算法生成对抗光照，结合兰伯特渲染模型和SfSNet估计反照率，并引入3D变换不变损失及敏感度图提升鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在仿真和物理实验中成功攻击了基于点云和深度图像的3D人脸识别算法，所需扰动量少于现有最佳方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法揭示了3D人脸识别系统的光学漏洞，为物理世界对抗攻击提供了新思路，需进一步加强系统防御能力。

authors_text: Pavel Osinenko,Grigory Yaremenko,Georgiy Malaniya
title: On stochastic stabilization via non-smooth control Lyapunov functions
title_zh: 基于非光滑控制李亚普诺夫函数的随机镇定
comment: Accepted for publication in IEEE Transactions on Automatic Control
comments: Accepted for publication in IEEE Transactions on Automatic Control
abstract: Control Lyapunov function is a central tool in stabilization. It generalizes an abstract energy function -- a Lyapunov function -- to the case of controlled systems. It is a known fact that most control Lyapunov functions are non-smooth -- so is the case in non-holonomic systems, like wheeled robots and cars. Frameworks for stabilization using non-smooth control Lyapunov functions exist, like Dini aiming and steepest descent. This work generalizes the related results to the stochastic case. As the groundwork, sampled control scheme is chosen in which control actions are computed at discrete moments in time using discrete measurements of the system state. In such a setup, special attention should be paid to the sample-to-sample behavior of the control Lyapunov function. A particular challenge here is a random noise acting on the system. The central result of this work is a theorem that states, roughly, that if there is a, generally non-smooth, control Lyapunov function, the given stochastic dynamical system can be practically stabilized in the sample-and-hold mode meaning that the control actions are held constant within sampling time steps. A particular control method chosen is based on Moreau-Yosida regularization, in other words, inf-convolution of the control Lyapunov function, but the overall framework is extendable to further control schemes. It is assumed that the system noise be bounded almost surely, although the case of unbounded noise is briefly addressed.

A particular control method chosen is based on Moreau-Yosida regularization, in other words, inf-convolution of the control Lyapunov function, but the overall framework is extendable to further control schemes. It is assumed that the system noise be bounded almost surely, although the case of unbounded noise is briefly addressed.
abstract_zh: 控制李亚普诺夫函数是稳定的核心工具。它将抽象能量函数——李亚普诺夫函数——推广到受控系统的情况。众所周知，大多数控制李亚普诺夫函数都是非光滑的——轮式机器人和汽车等非完整系统也是如此。存在使用非平滑控制李亚普诺夫函数的稳定框架，例如迪尼瞄准和最速下降。这项工作将相关结果推广到随机情况。作为基础，选择采样控制方案，其中使用系统状态的离散测量在离散时刻计算控制动作。在这样的设置中，应特别注意控制李雅普诺夫函数的样本到样本的行为。这里的一个特殊挑战是作用于系统的随机噪声。这项工作的核心结果是一个定理，粗略地说，如果存在一个通常非平滑的控制李亚普诺夫函数，则给定的随机动力系统实际上可以在采样保持模式下稳定，这意味着控制动作在采样时间步长内保持恒定。选择的特定控制方法基于 Moreau-Yosida 正则化，换句话说，控制 Lyapunov 函数的 inf 卷积，但总体框架可扩展到进一步的控制方案。尽管简要讨论了无界噪声的情况，但假设系统噪声几乎肯定是有界的。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了利用非光滑控制李雅普诺夫函数对随机动力系统进行稳定化的方法，提出基于采样控制的框架并考虑系统噪声影响。
AI.motivation: 现有控制李雅普诺夫函数理论多针对确定性系统，而随机系统中的噪声扰动和非光滑特性（如轮式机器人）尚未被充分解决，需扩展稳定化框架以应对随机性。
AI.method: 采用采样控制方案，通过Moreau-Yosida正则化（inf-卷积）处理非光滑函数，并分析采样间控制函数行为，假设噪声有界且扩展至无界噪声的简要讨论。
AI.result: 证明若存在非光滑控制李雅普诺夫函数，则随机系统可在采样保持模式下实现实际稳定化，且方法框架可扩展至其他控制策略。
AI.conclusion: 提出适用于随机系统的非光滑控制李雅普诺夫函数稳定化理论，有效处理噪声扰动，为非光滑随机控制提供新思路，无界噪声情形需进一步研究。

search_text: On stochastic stabilization via non-smooth control Lyapunov functions 基于非光滑控制李亚普诺夫函数的随机镇定 Control Lyapunov function is a central tool in stabilization. It generalizes an abstract energy function -- a Lyapunov function -- to the case of controlled systems. It is a known fact that most control Lyapunov functions are non-smooth -- so is the case in non-holonomic systems, like wheeled robots and cars. Frameworks for stabilization using non-smooth control Lyapunov functions exist, like Dini aiming and steepest descent. This work generalizes the related results to the stochastic case. As the groundwork, sampled control scheme is chosen in which control actions are computed at discrete moments in time using discrete measurements of the system state. In such a setup, special attention should be paid to the sample-to-sample behavior of the control Lyapunov function. A particular challenge here is a random noise acting on the system. The central result of this work is a theorem that states, roughly, that if there is a, generally non-smooth, control Lyapunov function, the given stochastic dynamical system can be practically stabilized in the sample-and-hold mode meaning that the control actions are held constant within sampling time steps. A particular control method chosen is based on Moreau-Yosida regularization, in other words, inf-convolution of the control Lyapunov function, but the overall framework is extendable to further control schemes. It is assumed that the system noise be bounded almost surely, although the case of unbounded noise is briefly addressed. 控制李亚普诺夫函数是稳定的核心工具。它将抽象能量函数——李亚普诺夫函数——推广到受控系统的情况。众所周知，大多数控制李亚普诺夫函数都是非光滑的——轮式机器人和汽车等非完整系统也是如此。存在使用非平滑控制李亚普诺夫函数的稳定框架，例如迪尼瞄准和最速下降。这项工作将相关结果推广到随机情况。作为基础，选择采样控制方案，其中使用系统状态的离散测量在离散时刻计算控制动作。在这样的设置中，应特别注意控制李雅普诺夫函数的样本到样本的行为。这里的一个特殊挑战是作用于系统的随机噪声。这项工作的核心结果是一个定理，粗略地说，如果存在一个通常非平滑的控制李亚普诺夫函数，则给定的随机动力系统实际上可以在采样保持模式下稳定，这意味着控制动作在采样时间步长内保持恒定。选择的特定控制方法基于 Moreau-Yosida 正则化，换句话说，控制 Lyapunov 函数的 inf 卷积，但总体框架可扩展到进一步的控制方案。尽管简要讨论了无界噪声的情况，但假设系统噪声几乎肯定是有界的。 本文研究了利用非光滑控制李雅普诺夫函数对随机动力系统进行稳定化的方法，提出基于采样控制的框架并考虑系统噪声影响。 Pavel Osinenko,Grigory Yaremenko,Georgiy Malaniya math.OC,cs.RO,eess.SY,math.DS

authors_text: Mayowa Ayodele,Richard Allmendinger,Manuel López-Ibáñez,Matthieu Parizy
title: Multi-objective QUBO Solver: Bi-objective Quadratic Assignment
title_zh: 多目标 QUBO 求解器：双目标二次分配
comment: The Genetic and Evolutionary Computation Conference 2022 (GECCO22)
comments: The Genetic and Evolutionary Computation Conference 2022 (GECCO22)
abstract: Quantum and quantum-inspired optimisation algorithms are designed to solve problems represented in binary, quadratic and unconstrained form. Combinatorial optimisation problems are therefore often formulated as Quadratic Unconstrained Binary Optimisation Problems (QUBO) to solve them with these algorithms. Moreover, these QUBO solvers are often implemented using specialised hardware to achieve enormous speedups, e.g. Fujitsu's Digital Annealer (DA) and D-Wave's Quantum Annealer. However, these are single-objective solvers, while many real-world problems feature multiple conflicting objectives. Thus, a common practice when using these QUBO solvers is to scalarise such multi-objective problems into a sequence of single-objective problems. Due to design trade-offs of these solvers, formulating each scalarisation may require more time than finding a local optimum. We present the first attempt to extend the algorithm supporting a commercial QUBO solver as a multi-objective solver that is not based on scalarisation. The proposed multi-objective DA algorithm is validated on the bi-objective Quadratic Assignment Problem. We observe that algorithm performance significantly depends on the archiving strategy adopted, and that combining DA with non-scalarisation methods to optimise multiple objectives outperforms the current scalarised version of the DA in terms of final solution quality.
summary: Quantum and quantum-inspired optimisation algorithms are designed to solve problems represented in binary, quadratic and unconstrained form. Combinatorial optimisation problems are therefore often formulated as Quadratic Unconstrained Binary Optimisation Problems (QUBO) to solve them with these algorithms. Moreover, these QUBO solvers are often implemented using specialised hardware to achieve enormous speedups, e.g. Fujitsu's Digital Annealer (DA) and D-Wave's Quantum Annealer. However, these are single-objective solvers, while many real-world problems feature multiple conflicting objectives. Thus, a common practice when using these QUBO solvers is to scalarise such multi-objective problems into a sequence of single-objective problems. Due to design trade-offs of these solvers, formulating each scalarisation may require more time than finding a local optimum. We present the first attempt to extend the algorithm supporting a commercial QUBO solver as a multi-objective solver that is not based on scalarisation. The proposed multi-objective DA algorithm is validated on the bi-objective Quadratic Assignment Problem. We observe that algorithm performance significantly depends on the archiving strategy adopted, and that combining DA with non-scalarisation methods to optimise multiple objectives outperforms the current scalarised version of the DA in terms of final solution quality.
abstract_zh: 量子和量子启发的优化算法旨在解决以二元、二次和无约束形式表示的问题。因此，组合优化问题通常被表述为二次无约束二元优化问题 (QUBO)，以使用这些算法来解决它们。此外，这些 QUBO 求解器通常使用专用硬件来实现，以实现巨大的加速，例如Fujitsu 的数字退火器 (DA) 和 D-Wave 的量子退火器。然而，这些都是单目标求解器，而许多现实世界的问题都具有多个相互冲突的目标。因此，使用这些 QUBO 求解器时的常见做法是将此类多目标问题分解为一系列单目标问题。由于这些求解器的设计权衡，制定每个标量化可能比寻找局部最优需要更多的时间。我们首次尝试扩展支持商业 QUBO 求解器的算法作为不基于标量化的多目标求解器。所提出的多目标 DA 算法在双目标二次分配问题上得到验证。我们观察到，算法性能很大程度上取决于所采用的归档策略，并且将 DA 与非标量化方法相结合来优化多个目标在最终解决方案质量方面优于 DA 的当前标配版本。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种非标量化多目标QUBO求解算法，并在双目标二次指派问题上验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有QUBO求解器多为单目标，而实际问题常存在多目标冲突，标量化方法耗时且影响解质量。
AI.method: 提出多目标数字退火算法，结合非标量化方法与不同存档策略优化多目标。
AI.result: 算法性能显著依赖存档策略，非标量化方法在解质量上优于标量化版本。
AI.conclusion: 非标量化多目标QUBO求解方法有效，为复杂优化问题提供新思路。

authors_text: Litan Kumar Das,Kumar Sankar Ray,Prakash Chandra Mali
title: Coalgebraic Fuzzy geometric logic
title_zh: 代数模糊几何逻辑
abstract: The paper aims to develop a framework for coalgebraic fuzzy geometric logic by adding modalities to the language of fuzzy geometric logic. Using the methods of coalgebra, the modal operators are introduced in the language of fuzzy geometric logic. To define the modal operators, we introduce a notion of fuzzy-open predicate lifting. Based on coalgebras for an endofunctor $T$ on the category $\textbf{Fuzzy-Top}$ of fuzzy topological spaces and fuzzy continuous maps, we build models for the coalgebraic fuzzy geometric logic. Bisimulations for the defined models are discussed in this work.
summary: The paper aims to develop a framework for coalgebraic fuzzy geometric logic by adding modalities to the language of fuzzy geometric logic. Using the methods of coalgebra, the modal operators are introduced in the language of fuzzy geometric logic. To define the modal operators, we introduce a notion of fuzzy-open predicate lifting. Based on coalgebras for an endofunctor $T$ on the category $\textbf{Fuzzy-Top}$ of fuzzy topological spaces and fuzzy continuous maps, we build models for the coalgebraic fuzzy geometric logic. Bisimulations for the defined models are discussed in this work.
abstract_zh: 本文旨在通过向模糊几何逻辑语言添加模态来开发联合代数模糊几何逻辑的框架。利用余代数的方法，用模糊几何逻辑语言引入模态算子。为了定义模态运算符，我们引入了模糊开放谓词提升的概念。基于模糊拓扑空间和模糊连续映射类别$\textbf{Fuzzy-Top}$上的尾函子$T$的余代数，我们构建了余代数模糊几何逻辑模型。这项工作讨论了定义模型的双向模拟。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过向模糊几何逻辑语言中添加模态算子，构建一个coalgebraic模糊几何逻辑框架，并基于模糊拓扑空间范畴的coalgebra建立模型。
AI.motivation: 扩展模糊几何逻辑以支持模态逻辑的表达，从而增强其在处理不确定性及动态系统建模中的适用性。
AI.method: 采用coalgebra方法引入模态算子，定义模糊开谓词提升，并基于Fuzzy-Top范畴中端函子T的coalgebra构建逻辑模型，讨论其双模拟关系。
AI.result: 成功建立了coalgebraic模糊几何逻辑的模型体系，并分析了相关双模拟性质，为模糊环境下的模态逻辑研究提供理论支持。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为模糊逻辑与coalgebra方法的结合提供了新视角，双模拟的探讨有助于模型间的比较与验证，未来可进一步拓展应用领域。

search_text: Coalgebraic Fuzzy geometric logic 代数模糊几何逻辑 The paper aims to develop a framework for coalgebraic fuzzy geometric logic by adding modalities to the language of fuzzy geometric logic. Using the methods of coalgebra, the modal operators are introduced in the language of fuzzy geometric logic. To define the modal operators, we introduce a notion of fuzzy-open predicate lifting. Based on coalgebras for an endofunctor $T$ on the category $\textbf{Fuzzy-Top}$ of fuzzy topological spaces and fuzzy continuous maps, we build models for the coalgebraic fuzzy geometric logic. Bisimulations for the defined models are discussed in this work. 本文旨在通过向模糊几何逻辑语言添加模态来开发联合代数模糊几何逻辑的框架。利用余代数的方法，用模糊几何逻辑语言引入模态算子。为了定义模态运算符，我们引入了模糊开放谓词提升的概念。基于模糊拓扑空间和模糊连续映射类别$\textbf{Fuzzy-Top}$上的尾函子$T$的余代数，我们构建了余代数模糊几何逻辑模型。这项工作讨论了定义模型的双向模拟。 本文旨在通过向模糊几何逻辑语言中添加模态算子，构建一个coalgebraic模糊几何逻辑框架，并基于模糊拓扑空间范畴的coalgebra建立模型。 Litan Kumar Das,Kumar Sankar Ray,Prakash Chandra Mali cs.LO,cs.AI

authors_text: Timmy S. T. Wan,Jun-Cheng Chen,Tzer-Yi Wu,Chu-Song Chen
title: Continual Learning for Visual Search with Backward Consistent Feature Embedding
title_zh: 具有后向一致特征嵌入的视觉搜索持续学习
comment: 15 pages with supplementary material; accepted to CVPR 2022
comments: 15 pages with supplementary material; accepted to CVPR 2022
abstract: In visual search, the gallery set could be incrementally growing and added to the database in practice. However, existing methods rely on the model trained on the entire dataset, ignoring the continual updating of the model. Besides, as the model updates, the new model must re-extract features for the entire gallery set to maintain compatible feature space, imposing a high computational cost for a large gallery set. To address the issues of long-term visual search, we introduce a continual learning (CL) approach that can handle the incrementally growing gallery set with backward embedding consistency. We enforce the losses of inter-session data coherence, neighbor-session model coherence, and intra-session discrimination to conduct a continual learner. In addition to the disjoint setup, our CL solution also tackles the situation of increasingly adding new classes for the blurry boundary without assuming all categories known in the beginning and during model update. To our knowledge, this is the first CL method both tackling the issue of backward-consistent feature embedding and allowing novel classes to occur in the new sessions. Extensive experiments on various benchmarks show the efficacy of our approach under a wide range of setups.
summary: In visual search, the gallery set could be incrementally growing and added to the database in practice. However, existing methods rely on the model trained on the entire dataset, ignoring the continual updating of the model. Besides, as the model updates, the new model must re-extract features for the entire gallery set to maintain compatible feature space, imposing a high computational cost for a large gallery set. To address the issues of long-term visual search, we introduce a continual learning (CL) approach that can handle the incrementally growing gallery set with backward embedding consistency. We enforce the losses of inter-session data coherence, neighbor-session model coherence, and intra-session discrimination to conduct a continual learner. In addition to the disjoint setup, our CL solution also tackles the situation of increasingly adding new classes for the blurry boundary without assuming all categories known in the beginning and during model update. To our knowledge, this is the first CL method both tackling the issue of backward-consistent feature embedding and allowing novel classes to occur in the new sessions. Extensive experiments on various benchmarks show the efficacy of our approach under a wide range of setups.
abstract_zh: 在视觉搜索中，图库集可以逐渐增长并在实践中添加到数据库中。然而，现有方法依赖于在整个数据集上训练的模型，忽略了模型的持续更新。此外，随着模型的更新，新模型必须重新提取整个图库集的特征以保持兼容的特征空间，这对大型图库集造成了很高的计算成本。为了解决长期视觉搜索的问题，我们引入了一种持续学习（CL）方法，该方法可以处理具有向后嵌入一致性的增量增长的图库集。我们强制损失会话间数据一致性、邻居会话模型一致性和会话内歧视来进行持续学习。除了不相交的设置之外，我们的 CL 解决方案还解决了为模糊边界不断添加新类的情况，而不假设在开始和模型更新期间已知所有类别。据我们所知，这是第一个既解决向后一致特征嵌入问题又允许在新会话中出现新类的 CL 方法。对各种基准的广泛实验表明了我们的方法在各种设置下的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种持续学习方法，用于处理视觉搜索中不断增长的画廊集，通过向后一致的特征嵌入保持特征空间兼容性。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉搜索方法在画廊集增量增长时需重新提取全部特征，计算成本高；且无法处理新会话中未知类别的增量添加问题。
AI.method: 设计持续学习框架，通过跨会话数据一致性损失、相邻会话模型一致性损失和会话内判别损失，实现向后一致的特征嵌入，支持未知类别的增量学习。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中验证了方法在不同场景下的有效性，包括离散设置和渐进新增类别场景。
AI.conclusion: 首次将向后一致特征嵌入与新型类增量学习结合，解决了持续视觉搜索中的关键挑战。

authors_text: Zhenting Wang,Juan Zhai,Shiqing Ma
title: BppAttack: Stealthy and Efficient Trojan Attacks against Deep Neural Networks via Image Quantization and Contrastive Adversarial Learning
title_zh: BppAttack：通过图像量化和对比对抗学习对深度神经网络进行隐秘且高效的木马攻击
abstract: Deep neural networks are vulnerable to Trojan attacks. Existing attacks use visible patterns (e.g., a patch or image transformations) as triggers, which are vulnerable to human inspection. In this paper, we propose stealthy and efficient Trojan attacks, BppAttack. Based on existing biology literature on human visual systems, we propose to use image quantization and dithering as the Trojan trigger, making imperceptible changes. It is a stealthy and efficient attack without training auxiliary models. Due to the small changes made to images, it is hard to inject such triggers during training. To alleviate this problem, we propose a contrastive learning based approach that leverages adversarial attacks to generate negative sample pairs so that the learned trigger is precise and accurate. The proposed method achieves high attack success rates on four benchmark datasets, including MNIST, CIFAR-10, GTSRB, and CelebA. It also effectively bypasses existing Trojan defenses and human inspection. Our code can be found in https://github.com/RU-System-Software-and-Security/BppAttack.
summary: Deep neural networks are vulnerable to Trojan attacks. Existing attacks use visible patterns (e.g., a patch or image transformations) as triggers, which are vulnerable to human inspection. In this paper, we propose stealthy and efficient Trojan attacks, BppAttack. Based on existing biology literature on human visual systems, we propose to use image quantization and dithering as the Trojan trigger, making imperceptible changes. It is a stealthy and efficient attack without training auxiliary models. Due to the small changes made to images, it is hard to inject such triggers during training. To alleviate this problem, we propose a contrastive learning based approach that leverages adversarial attacks to generate negative sample pairs so that the learned trigger is precise and accurate. The proposed method achieves high attack success rates on four benchmark datasets, including MNIST, CIFAR-10, GTSRB, and CelebA. It also effectively bypasses existing Trojan defenses and human inspection. Our code can be found in https://github.com/RU-System-Software-and-Security/BppAttack.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络容易受到木马攻击。现有的攻击使用可见模式（例如补丁或图像转换）作为触发器，这很容易受到人类检查的影响。在本文中，我们提出了隐秘且高效的木马攻击——BppAttack。基于现有的关于人类视觉系统的生物学文献，我们建议使用图像量化和抖动作为特洛伊木马触发器，产生难以察觉的变化。这是一种隐秘且高效的攻击，无需训练辅助模型。由于对图像进行的微小更改，在训练期间很难注入此类触发器。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种基于对比学习的方法，利用对抗性攻击来生成负样本对，以便学习到的触发是精确的。所提出的方法在 MNIST、CIFAR-10、GTSRB 和 CelebA 等四个基准数据集上实现了较高的攻击成功率。它还有效地绕过现有的特洛伊木马防御和人工检查。我们的代码可以在 https://github.com/RU-System-Software-and-Security/BppAttack 中找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为BppAttack的隐蔽且高效的深度神经网络水印攻击方法，通过图像量化和对比对抗学习实现不可察觉的触发器注入。
AI.motivation: 现有水印攻击依赖可见触发器易被检测，本文旨在基于人眼视觉系统特性设计隐蔽触发器，提升攻击隐蔽性与效率。
AI.method: 结合图像量化与抖动技术生成不可察觉触发器，并采用对比学习框架通过对抗攻击生成负样本对，优化触发器精确度。
AI.result: 在MNIST、CIFAR-10等四个基准数据集上实现高攻击成功率，有效绕过现有防御机制与人工检测。
AI.conclusion: BppAttack验证了基于视觉隐写技术的水印攻击有效性，为深度学习安全研究提供了新思路与防御挑战。

The proposed method achieves high attack success rates on four benchmark datasets, including MNIST, CIFAR-10, GTSRB, and CelebA. It also effectively bypasses existing Trojan defenses and human inspection. Our code can be found in https://github.com/RU-System-Software-and-Security/BppAttack. 深度神经网络容易受到木马攻击。现有的攻击使用可见模式（例如补丁或图像转换）作为触发器，这很容易受到人类检查的影响。在本文中，我们提出了隐秘且高效的木马攻击——BppAttack。基于现有的关于人类视觉系统的生物学文献，我们建议使用图像量化和抖动作为特洛伊木马触发器，产生难以察觉的变化。这是一种隐秘且高效的攻击，无需训练辅助模型。由于对图像进行的微小更改，在训练期间很难注入此类触发器。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种基于对比学习的方法，利用对抗性攻击来生成负样本对，以便学习到的触发是精确的。所提出的方法在 MNIST、CIFAR-10、GTSRB 和 CelebA 等四个基准数据集上实现了较高的攻击成功率。它还有效地绕过现有的特洛伊木马防御和人工检查。我们的代码可以在 https://github.com/RU-System-Software-and-Security/BppAttack 中找到。 本文提出一种名为BppAttack的隐蔽且高效的深度神经网络水印攻击方法，通过图像量化和对比对抗学习实现不可察觉的触发器注入。 Zhenting Wang,Juan Zhai,Shiqing Ma cs.CV,cs.CR,cs.LG

authors_text: Sarah Isufi,Kristijan Poje,Igor Vukobratovic,Mario Brcic
title: Prismal view of ethics
title_zh: 棱镜伦理观
abstract: We shall have a hard look at ethics and try to extract insights in the form of abstract properties that might become tools. We want to connect ethics to games, talk about the performance of ethics, introduce curiosity into the interplay between competing and coordinating in well-performing ethics, and offer a view of possible developments that could unify increasing aggregates of entities. All this is under a long shadow cast by computational complexity that is quite negative about games. This analysis is the first step toward finding modeling aspects that might be used in AI ethics for integrating modern AI systems into human society.
summary: We shall have a hard look at ethics and try to extract insights in the form of abstract properties that might become tools. We want to connect ethics to games, talk about the performance of ethics, introduce curiosity into the interplay between competing and coordinating in well-performing ethics, and offer a view of possible developments that could unify increasing aggregates of entities. All this is under a long shadow cast by computational complexity that is quite negative about games. This analysis is the first step toward finding modeling aspects that might be used in AI ethics for integrating modern AI systems into human society.
abstract_zh: 我们将认真审视伦理学，并尝试以可能成为工具的抽象属性的形式提取见解。我们希望将道德与游戏联系起来，讨论道德的表现，将好奇心引入到表现良好的道德中竞争与协调之间的相互作用，并提供可能的发展观点，以统一不断增加的实体群体。所有这一切都受到计算复杂性的影响，这对游戏来说是相当负面的。这项分析是寻找可用于人工智能伦理的建模方面的第一步，以将现代人工智能系统融入人类社会。

AI.tldr: 通过抽象属性将伦理与游戏结合，探索伦理在AI系统中的应用
AI.motivation: 应对计算复杂性对游戏的挑战，推动AI伦理模型的发展，以促进AI与人类社会的整合
AI.method: 通过分析伦理性能，结合游戏理论与好奇心机制，探讨竞争与协调的动态平衡
AI.result: 提出了伦理模型的初步框架，为AI伦理的进一步研究奠定基础
AI.conclusion: 为AI伦理的建模提供了新视角，强调了跨学科方法在解决伦理与计算复杂性问题中的重要性

authors_text: Wonjun Kang,Geonsu Lee,Hyung Il Koo,Nam Ik Cho
title: One-Shot Face Reenactment on Megapixels
title_zh: 百万像素的一次面部重演
abstract: The goal of face reenactment is to transfer a target expression and head pose to a source face while preserving the source identity. With the popularity of face-related applications, there has been much research on this topic. However, the results of existing methods are still limited to low-resolution and lack photorealism. In this work, we present a one-shot and high-resolution face reenactment method called MegaFR. To be precise, we leverage StyleGAN by using 3DMM-based rendering images and overcome the lack of high-quality video datasets by designing a loss function that works without high-quality videos. Also, we apply iterative refinement to deal with extreme poses and/or expressions. Since the proposed method controls source images through 3DMM parameters, we can explicitly manipulate source images. We apply MegaFR to various applications such as face frontalization, eye in-painting, and talking head generation. Experimental results show that our method successfully disentangles identity from expression and head pose, and outperforms conventional methods.
summary: The goal of face reenactment is to transfer a target expression and head pose to a source face while preserving the source identity. With the popularity of face-related applications, there has been much research on this topic. However, the results of existing methods are still limited to low-resolution and lack photorealism. In this work, we present a one-shot and high-resolution face reenactment method called MegaFR. To be precise, we leverage StyleGAN by using 3DMM-based rendering images and overcome the lack of high-quality video datasets by designing a loss function that works without high-quality videos. Also, we apply iterative refinement to deal with extreme poses and/or expressions. Since the proposed method controls source images through 3DMM parameters, we can explicitly manipulate source images. We apply MegaFR to various applications such as face frontalization, eye in-painting, and talking head generation. Experimental results show that our method successfully disentangles identity from expression and head pose, and outperforms conventional methods.
abstract_zh: 面部重演的目标是将目标表情和头部姿势转移到源面部，同时保留源身份。随着人脸相关应用的流行，人们对这一主题进行了大量的研究。然而，现有方法的结果仍然局限于低分辨率并且缺乏真实感。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种称为 MegaFR 的一次性高分辨率面部重演方法。准确地说，我们通过使用基于 3DMM 的渲染图像来利用 StyleGAN，并通过设计无需高质量视频的损失函数来克服缺乏高质量视频数据集的问题。此外，我们应用迭代细化来处理极端的姿势和/或表情。由于所提出的方法通过 3DMM 参数控制源图像，因此我们可以显式地操纵源图像。我们将 MegaFR 应用于各种应用，例如脸部正面化、眼睛修复和头像生成。实验结果表明，我们的方法成功地将身份与表情和头部姿势分开，并且优于传统方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高分辨率的一次性人脸重演方法MegaFR，能够在保持源身份的同时，将目标表情和头部姿态迁移至源人脸。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在低分辨率下效果有限且缺乏真实感，难以满足高分辨率人脸重演需求，因此需要开发一种无需高质量视频数据集的高分辨率解决方案。
AI.method: 基于StyleGAN框架，结合3DMM参数控制源图像，并设计无需高质量视频的损失函数；通过迭代优化处理极端姿态和表情，实现高分辨率人脸重演。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能有效分离身份与表情/姿态信息，在人脸正则化、眼部修复和说话头生成等任务中优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: MegaFR通过3DMM参数控制和迭代优化，在高分辨率下实现了高质量人脸重演，为相关应用提供了新思路。

authors_text: Zhang Bingyu,Nikolay Arefyev
title: The Document Vectors Using Cosine Similarity Revisited
title_zh: 重新审视使​​用余弦相似度的文档向量
comment: ef:Proceedings of the Third Workshop on Insights from Negative Results in NLP, pages 129-133, Dublin, Ireland. Association for Computational Linguistics. 2022
comments: ef:Proceedings of the Third Workshop on Insights from Negative Results in NLP, pages 129-133, Dublin, Ireland. Association for Computational Linguistics. 2022
abstract: The current state-of-the-art test accuracy (97.42\%) on the IMDB movie reviews dataset was reported by \citet{thongtan-phienthrakul-2019-sentiment} and achieved by the logistic regression classifier trained on the Document Vectors using Cosine Similarity (DV-ngrams-cosine) proposed in their paper and the Bag-of-N-grams (BON) vectors scaled by Naive Bayesian weights. While large pre-trained Transformer-based models have shown SOTA results across many datasets and tasks, the aforementioned model has not been surpassed by them, despite being much simpler and pre-trained on the IMDB dataset only. In this paper, we describe an error in the evaluation procedure of this model, which was found when we were trying to analyze its excellent performance on the IMDB dataset. We further show that the previously reported test accuracy of 97.42\% is invalid and should be corrected to 93.68\%. We also analyze the model performance with different amounts of training data (subsets of the IMDB dataset) and compare it to the Transformer-based RoBERTa model. The results show that while RoBERTa has a clear advantage for larger training sets, the DV-ngrams-cosine performs better than RoBERTa when the labelled training set is very small (10 or 20 documents). Finally, we introduce a sub-sampling scheme based on Naive Bayesian weights for the training process of the DV-ngrams-cosine, which leads to faster training and better quality.
summary: The current state-of-the-art test accuracy (97.42\%) on the IMDB movie reviews dataset was reported by \citet{thongtan-phienthrakul-2019-sentiment} and achieved by the logistic regression classifier trained on the Document Vectors using Cosine Similarity (DV-ngrams-cosine) proposed in their paper and the Bag-of-N-grams (BON) vectors scaled by Naive Bayesian weights. While large pre-trained Transformer-based models have shown SOTA results across many datasets and tasks, the aforementioned model has not been surpassed by them, despite being much simpler and pre-trained on the IMDB dataset only. In this paper, we describe an error in the evaluation procedure of this model, which was found when we were trying to analyze its excellent performance on the IMDB dataset. We further show that the previously reported test accuracy of 97.42\% is invalid and should be corrected to 93.68\%. We also analyze the model performance with different amounts of training data (subsets of the IMDB dataset) and compare it to the Transformer-based RoBERTa model. The results show that while RoBERTa has a clear advantage for larger training sets, the DV-ngrams-cosine performs better than RoBERTa when the labelled training set is very small (10 or 20 documents). Finally, we introduce a sub-sampling scheme based on Naive Bayesian weights for the training process of the DV-ngrams-cosine, which leads to faster training and better quality.
abstract_zh: \citet{thongtan-phienthrakul-2019-sentiment} 报告了 IMDB 电影评论数据集当前最先进的测试准确率 (97.42\%)，并通过使用论文中提出的余弦相似度 (DV-ngrams-cosine) 和通过朴素贝叶斯权重缩放的 Bag-of-N-grams (BON) 向量对文档向量进行训练的逻辑回归分类器来实现。虽然基于 Transformer 的大型预训练模型已经在许多数据集和任务中显示了 SOTA 结果，但上述模型尚未被它们超越，尽管它更简单并且仅在 IMDB 数据集上进行预训练。在本文中，我们描述了该模型评估过程中的一个错误，该错误是在我们尝试分析其在 IMDB 数据集上的出色性能时发现的。我们进一步表明，之前报告的测试准确度 97.42\% 是无效的，应更正为 93.68\%。我们还分析了不同数量的训练数据（IMDB 数据集的子集）的模型性能，并将其与基于 Transformer 的 RoBERTa 模型进行比较。结果表明，虽然 RoBERTa 对于较大的训练集具有明显的优势，但当标记的训练集非常小时（10 或 20 个文档）时，DV-ngrams-cosine 的表现优于 RoBERTa。最后，我们在 DV-ngrams-cosine 的训练过程中引入了基于朴素贝叶斯权重的子采样方案，从而实现更快的训练和更好的质量。

AI.tldr: 本文重新评估了基于余弦相似度的文档向量模型（DV-ngrams-cosine）在IMDB数据集上的性能，修正了先前报告的测试准确率，并与RoBERTa模型进行了比较。
AI.motivation: 先前报告的DV-ngrams-cosine模型在IMDB数据集上达到97.42%的测试准确率被质疑，作者发现其评估过程存在错误，需修正结果并分析模型在不同训练数据量下的表现。
AI.method: 修正原始模型的评估错误，通过不同规模的IMDB训练子集测试模型性能，与RoBERTa对比，并引入基于朴素贝叶斯权重的子采样方案优化训练。
AI.result: 修正后测试准确率从97.42%降至93.68%；在极小训练集（10/20文档）下DV-ngrams-cosine优于RoBERTa；子采样方案提升了训练效率和模型质量。
AI.conclusion: 原始高准确率结果不可靠，DV-ngrams-cosine在小数据场景下仍具优势，改进的子采样方法可有效优化其训练过程。

ai_content.tldr: 本文重新评估了基于余弦相似度的文档向量模型（DV-ngrams-cosine）在IMDB数据集上的性能，修正了先前报告的测试准确率，并与RoBERTa模型进行了比较。
ai_content.motivation: 先前报告的DV-ngrams-cosine模型在IMDB数据集上达到97.42%的测试准确率被质疑，作者发现其评估过程存在错误，需修正结果并分析模型在不同训练数据量下的表现。

ai_content.result: 修正后测试准确率从97.42%降至93.68%；在极小训练集（10/20文档）下DV-ngrams-cosine优于RoBERTa；子采样方案提升了训练效率和模型质量。

search_text: The Document Vectors Using Cosine Similarity Revisited 重新审视使​​用余弦相似度的文档向量 The current state-of-the-art test accuracy (97.42\%) on the IMDB movie reviews dataset was reported by \citet{thongtan-phienthrakul-2019-sentiment} and achieved by the logistic regression classifier trained on the Document Vectors using Cosine Similarity (DV-ngrams-cosine) proposed in their paper and the Bag-of-N-grams (BON) vectors scaled by Naive Bayesian weights. While large pre-trained Transformer-based models have shown SOTA results across many datasets and tasks, the aforementioned model has not been surpassed by them, despite being much simpler and pre-trained on the IMDB dataset only. In this paper, we describe an error in the evaluation procedure of this model, which was found when we were trying to analyze its excellent performance on the IMDB dataset. We further show that the previously reported test accuracy of 97.42\% is invalid and should be corrected to 93.68\%. We also analyze the model performance with different amounts of training data (subsets of the IMDB dataset) and compare it to the Transformer-based RoBERTa model. The results show that while RoBERTa has a clear advantage for larger training sets, the DV-ngrams-cosine performs better than RoBERTa when the labelled training set is very small (10 or 20 documents). Finally, we introduce a sub-sampling scheme based on Naive Bayesian weights for the training process of the DV-ngrams-cosine, which leads to faster training and better quality. \citet{thongtan-phienthrakul-2019-sentiment} 报告了 IMDB 电影评论数据集当前最先进的测试准确率 (97.42\%)，并通过使用论文中提出的余弦相似度 (DV-ngrams-cosine) 和通过朴素贝叶斯权重缩放的 Bag-of-N-grams (BON) 向量对文档向量进行训练的逻辑回归分类器来实现。虽然基于 Transformer 的大型预训练模型已经在许多数据集和任务中显示了 SOTA 结果，但上述模型尚未被它们超越，尽管它更简单并且仅在 IMDB 数据集上进行预训练。在本文中，我们描述了该模型评估过程中的一个错误，该错误是在我们尝试分析其在 IMDB 数据集上的出色性能时发现的。我们进一步表明，之前报告的测试准确度 97.42\% 是无效的，应更正为 93.68\%。我们还分析了不同数量的训练数据（IMDB 数据集的子集）的模型性能，并将其与基于 Transformer 的 RoBERTa 模型进行比较。结果表明，虽然 RoBERTa 对于较大的训练集具有明显的优势，但当标记的训练集非常小时（10 或 20 个文档）时，DV-ngrams-cosine 的表现优于 RoBERTa。最后，我们在 DV-ngrams-cosine 的训练过程中引入了基于朴素贝叶斯权重的子采样方案，从而实现更快的训练和更好的质量。 本文重新评估了基于余弦相似度的文档向量模型（DV-ngrams-cosine）在IMDB数据集上的性能，修正了先前报告的测试准确率，并与RoBERTa模型进行了比较。 Zhang Bingyu,Nikolay Arefyev cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Manuel Traub,Sebastian Otte,Tobias Menge,Matthias Karlbauer,Jannik Thümmel,Martin V. Butz
title: Learning What and Where: Disentangling Location and Identity Tracking Without Supervision
title_zh: 了解内容和地点：在没有监督的情况下解开位置和身份跟踪
abstract: Our brain can almost effortlessly decompose visual data streams into background and salient objects. Moreover, it can anticipate object motion and interactions, which are crucial abilities for conceptual planning and reasoning. Recent object reasoning datasets, such as CATER, have revealed fundamental shortcomings of current vision-based AI systems, particularly when targeting explicit object representations, object permanence, and object reasoning. Here we introduce a self-supervised LOCation and Identity tracking system (Loci), which excels on the CATER tracking challenge. Inspired by the dorsal and ventral pathways in the brain, Loci tackles the binding problem by processing separate, slot-wise encodings of `what' and `where'. Loci's predictive coding-like processing encourages active error minimization, such that individual slots tend to encode individual objects. Interactions between objects and object dynamics are processed in the disentangled latent space. Truncated backpropagation through time combined with forward eligibility accumulation significantly speeds up learning and improves memory efficiency. Besides exhibiting superior performance in current benchmarks, Loci effectively extracts objects from video streams and separates them into location and Gestalt components. We believe that this separation offers a representation that will facilitate effective planning and reasoning on conceptual levels.
summary: Our brain can almost effortlessly decompose visual data streams into background and salient objects. Moreover, it can anticipate object motion and interactions, which are crucial abilities for conceptual planning and reasoning. Recent object reasoning datasets, such as CATER, have revealed fundamental shortcomings of current vision-based AI systems, particularly when targeting explicit object representations, object permanence, and object reasoning. Here we introduce a self-supervised LOCation and Identity tracking system (Loci), which excels on the CATER tracking challenge. Inspired by the dorsal and ventral pathways in the brain, Loci tackles the binding problem by processing separate, slot-wise encodings of `what' and `where'. Loci's predictive coding-like processing encourages active error minimization, such that individual slots tend to encode individual objects. Interactions between objects and object dynamics are processed in the disentangled latent space. Truncated backpropagation through time combined with forward eligibility accumulation significantly speeds up learning and improves memory efficiency. Besides exhibiting superior performance in current benchmarks, Loci effectively extracts objects from video streams and separates them into location and Gestalt components. We believe that this separation offers a representation that will facilitate effective planning and reasoning on conceptual levels.
abstract_zh: 我们的大脑几乎可以毫不费力地将视觉数据流分解为背景和显着物体。此外，它可以预测物体的运动和交互，这是概念规划和推理的关键能力。最近的对象推理数据集（例如 CATER）揭示了当前基于视觉的人工智能系统的根本缺点，特别是在针对明确的对象表示、对象持久性和对象推理时。在这里，我们介绍一个自我监督的位置和身份跟踪系统 (Loci)，该系统在 CATER 跟踪挑战中表现出色。受大脑背侧和腹侧通路的启发，Loci 通过处理“什么”和“哪里”的单独、按槽编码来解决绑定问题。 Loci 的类似预测编码的处理鼓励主动错误最小化，使得各个槽倾向于对各个对象进行编码。对象和对象动力学之间的交互在解纠缠的潜在空间中进行处理。随着时间的截断反向传播与前向资格积累相结合，显着加快了学习速度并提高了记忆效率。除了在当前基准测试中表现出卓越的性能外，Loci 还可以有效地从视频流中提取对象，并将其分离为位置和格式塔组件。我们相信，这种分离提供了一种表示形式，将有助于在概念层面上进行有效的规划和推理。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自监督的LOC与身份追踪系统Loci，能够在无需监督的情况下从视频流中分离物体的位置与身份信息。
AI.motivation: 当前基于视觉的AI系统在目标表示、物体恒存性及推理任务中存在显著不足，需借鉴人类视觉系统机制提升性能。
AI.method: 受大脑背侧/腹侧通路启发，通过分离‘what’（物体身份）与‘where’（位置）的槽位编码，结合预测编码框架与截断时间反向传播技术实现高效学习。
AI.result: Loci在CATER追踪挑战中表现优异，可有效从视频中分离物体并区分其位置信息与格式塔特征。
AI.conclusion: 该分离表征方式为概念层面的规划与推理提供了更有效的基础，推动类人视觉认知能力的实现。

authors_text: Josiane Maria Macedo Fernandes,Marcelo Costa Tanaka,Raimundo Carlos Silvério Freire Júnior,Wallace Moreira Bessa
title: A neural network based controller for underwater robotic vehicles
title_zh: 基于神经网络的水下机器人控制器
comment: References added. This is a slightly updated version of the work presented at the COBEM 2011 - 21st Congress of Mechanical Engineering, 2011, Natal Brazil
comments: References added. This is a slightly updated version of the work presented at the COBEM 2011 - 21st Congress of Mechanical Engineering, 2011, Natal Brazil
abstract: Due to the enormous technological improvements obtained in the last decades it is possible to use robotic vehicles for underwater exploration. This work describes the development of a dynamic positioning system for remotely operated underwater vehicles based. The adopted approach is developed using Lyapunov Stability Theory and enhanced by a neural network based algorithm for uncertainty and disturbance compensation. The performance of the proposed control scheme is evaluated by means of numerical simulations.
summary: Due to the enormous technological improvements obtained in the last decades it is possible to use robotic vehicles for underwater exploration. This work describes the development of a dynamic positioning system for remotely operated underwater vehicles based. The adopted approach is developed using Lyapunov Stability Theory and enhanced by a neural network based algorithm for uncertainty and disturbance compensation. The performance of the proposed control scheme is evaluated by means of numerical simulations.
abstract_zh: 由于过去几十年取得的巨大技术进步，使用机器人车辆进行水下探索成为可能。这项工作描述了基于远程操作水下航行器的动态定位系统的开发。所采用的方法是利用李亚普诺夫稳定性理论开发的，并通过基于神经网络的不确定性和干扰补偿算法进行了增强。通过数值模拟评估所提出的控制方案的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合神经网络的动态定位系统，用于改进水下遥控机器人的控制性能。
AI.motivation: 水下探索技术进步需求更鲁棒的控制系统以应对环境不确定性和干扰。
AI.method: 基于李雅普诺夫稳定性理论设计控制器，并引入神经网络补偿不确定性与干扰。
AI.result: 通过数值仿真验证了所提控制方案的有效性和稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为水下机器人提供了更可靠的动态定位解决方案，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Jianzong Wang,Shijing Si,Zhitao Zhu,Xiaoyang Qu,Zhenhou Hong,Jing Xiao
title: Leveraging Causal Inference for Explainable Automatic Program Repair
title_zh: 利用因果推理进行可解释的自动程序修复
comment: This paper has been accepted by IJCNN2022
comments: This paper has been accepted by IJCNN2022
abstract: Deep learning models have made significant progress in automatic program repair. However, the black-box nature of these methods has restricted their practical applications. To address this challenge, this paper presents an interpretable approach for program repair based on sequence-to-sequence models with causal inference and our method is called CPR, short for causal program repair. Our CPR can generate explanations in the process of decision making, which consists of groups of causally related input-output tokens. Firstly, our method infers these relations by querying the model with inputs disturbed by data augmentation. Secondly, it generates a graph over tokens from the responses and solves a partitioning problem to select the most relevant components. The experiments on four programming languages (Java, C, Python, and JavaScript) show that CPR can generate causal graphs for reasonable interpretations and boost the performance of bug fixing in automatic program repair.
summary: Deep learning models have made significant progress in automatic program repair. However, the black-box nature of these methods has restricted their practical applications. To address this challenge, this paper presents an interpretable approach for program repair based on sequence-to-sequence models with causal inference and our method is called CPR, short for causal program repair. Our CPR can generate explanations in the process of decision making, which consists of groups of causally related input-output tokens. Firstly, our method infers these relations by querying the model with inputs disturbed by data augmentation. Secondly, it generates a graph over tokens from the responses and solves a partitioning problem to select the most relevant components. The experiments on four programming languages (Java, C, Python, and JavaScript) show that CPR can generate causal graphs for reasonable interpretations and boost the performance of bug fixing in automatic program repair.
abstract_zh: 深度学习模型在自动程序修复方面取得了重大进展。然而，这些方法的黑盒性质限制了它们的实际应用。为了应对这一挑战，本文提出了一种基于具有因果推理的序列到序列模型的可解释的程序修复方法，我们的方法称为 CPR，是因果程序修复的缩写。我们的 CPR 可以在决策过程中生成解释，该解释由一组因果相关的输入输出标记组成。首先，我们的方法通过使用受数据增强干扰的输入查询模型来推断这些关系。其次，它根据响应生成令牌图，并解决分区问题以选择最相关的组件。在四种编程语言（Java、C、Python和JavaScript）上的实验表明，CPR可以生成因果图进行合理解释，并提高自动程序修复中错误修复的性能。

AI.motivation: 现有自动程序修复方法多为黑箱模型，缺乏可解释性，限制其实际应用，需开发可解释方法以提升可信度和实用性
AI.method: 基于序列到序列模型，结合因果推理，通过数据增强扰动输入推断因果关系，生成令牌图并划分关键组件以生成解释
AI.result: 在Java、C、Python、JavaScript四种语言实验中，CPR生成有效因果图并提升自动程序修复的错误修复性能
AI.conclusion: CPR方法验证了因果推理在自动程序修复中的有效性，为可解释AI在软件工程中的应用提供了新方向

authors_text: Ran Ben Basat,Shay Vargaftik,Amit Portnoy,Gil Einziger,Yaniv Ben-Itzhak,Michael Mitzenmacher
title: QUIC-FL: Quick Unbiased Compression for Federated Learning
title_zh: QUIC-FL：联邦学习的快速无偏压缩
abstract: Distributed Mean Estimation (DME), in which $n$ clients communicate vectors to a parameter server that estimates their average, is a fundamental building block in communication-efficient federated learning. In this paper, we improve on previous DME techniques that achieve the optimal $O(1/n)$ Normalized Mean Squared Error (NMSE) guarantee by asymptotically improving the complexity for either encoding or decoding (or both). To achieve this, we formalize the problem in a novel way that allows us to use off-the-shelf mathematical solvers to design the quantization.
summary: Distributed Mean Estimation (DME), in which $n$ clients communicate vectors to a parameter server that estimates their average, is a fundamental building block in communication-efficient federated learning. In this paper, we improve on previous DME techniques that achieve the optimal $O(1/n)$ Normalized Mean Squared Error (NMSE) guarantee by asymptotically improving the complexity for either encoding or decoding (or both). To achieve this, we formalize the problem in a novel way that allows us to use off-the-shelf mathematical solvers to design the quantization.
abstract_zh: 分布式均值估计 (DME) 是高效通信联邦学习的基本构建块，其中 $n$ 个客户端将向量传递给估计其平均值的参数服务器。在本文中，我们改进了以前的 DME 技术，通过渐近提高编码或解码（或两者）的复杂性来实现最佳 $O(1/n)$ 归一化均方误差 (NMSE) 保证。为了实现这一目标，我们以一种新颖的方式将问题形式化，使我们能够使用现成的数学求解器来设计量化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出QUIC-FL方法，通过优化编码或解码复杂度提升联邦学习中分布式均值估计的通信效率，同时保持最优误差保证。
AI.motivation: 现有分布式均值估计技术虽达到最优NMSE误差，但编码或解码复杂度未被充分优化，影响联邦学习的通信效率。
AI.method: 通过新颖的问题形式化框架，利用现成数学求解器设计量化方案，实现编码/解码复杂度的渐近优化。
AI.result: 在保持O(1/n)归一化均方误差的前提下，实现编码或解码复杂度的渐近降低（或两者同时优化）。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为联邦学习提供了更高效的通信压缩方案，在误差保证与计算复杂度间取得平衡。
