authors_text: Omer Belhasin,Guy Bar-Shalom,Ran El-Yaniv
title: TransBoost: Improving the Best ImageNet Performance using Deep Transduction
title_zh: TransBoost：使用深度转换提高最佳 ImageNet 性能
abstract: This paper deals with deep transductive learning, and proposes TransBoost as a procedure for fine-tuning any deep neural model to improve its performance on any (unlabeled) test set provided at training time. TransBoost is inspired by a large margin principle and is efficient and simple to use. Our method significantly improves the ImageNet classification performance on a wide range of architectures, such as ResNets, MobileNetV3-L, EfficientNetB0, ViT-S, and ConvNext-T, leading to state-of-the-art transductive performance. Additionally we show that TransBoost is effective on a wide variety of image classification datasets. The implementation of TransBoost is provided at: https://github.com/omerb01/TransBoost .
summary: This paper deals with deep transductive learning, and proposes TransBoost as a procedure for fine-tuning any deep neural model to improve its performance on any (unlabeled) test set provided at training time. TransBoost is inspired by a large margin principle and is efficient and simple to use. Our method significantly improves the ImageNet classification performance on a wide range of architectures, such as ResNets, MobileNetV3-L, EfficientNetB0, ViT-S, and ConvNext-T, leading to state-of-the-art transductive performance. Additionally we show that TransBoost is effective on a wide variety of image classification datasets. The implementation of TransBoost is provided at: https://github.com/omerb01/TransBoost .
abstract_zh: 本文涉及深度转导学习，并提出 TransBoost 作为微调任何深度神经模型的过程，以提高其在训练时提供的任何（未标记）测试集上的性能。 TransBoost 的灵感来自于大裕度原理，高效且易于使用。我们的方法显着提高了 ResNets、MobileNetV3-L、EfficientNetB0、ViT-S 和 ConvNext-T 等各种架构上的 ImageNet 分类性能，从而实现了最先进的转换性能。此外，我们还表明 TransBoost 对于各种图像分类数据集都是有效的。 TransBoost 的实现位于：https://github.com/omerb01/TransBoost。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TransBoost方法，通过深度直推学习提升图像分类模型在测试集上的性能，尤其在ImageNet数据集上取得显著效果。
AI.motivation: 现有深度模型在训练集上表现优异，但如何有效利用训练时提供的未标记测试集信息以进一步提升性能仍存在挑战。
AI.method: 基于大边距原则设计TransBoost微调框架，通过调整模型参数使模型更适应提供的测试集分布，方法简单高效且适用于多种网络架构。
AI.result: 在ImageNet数据集上，TransBoost显著提升ResNets、MobileNetV3-L等主流模型的分类性能，达到当时最优的直推学习效果，并在其他图像分类数据集上验证了有效性。
AI.conclusion: TransBoost提供了一种通用且高效的深度直推学习方案，能够有效提升模型在测试集上的表现，为模型微调提供了新思路。

authors_text: Jiarui Feng,Yixin Chen,Fuhai Li,Anindya Sarkar,Muhan Zhang
title: How Powerful are K-hop Message Passing Graph Neural Networks
title_zh: K-hop 消息传递图神经网络有多强大
abstract: The most popular design paradigm for Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) is 1-hop message passing -- aggregating information from 1-hop neighbors repeatedly. However, the expressive power of 1-hop message passing is bounded by the Weisfeiler-Lehman (1-WL) test. Recently, researchers extended 1-hop message passing to K-hop message passing by aggregating information from K-hop neighbors of nodes simultaneously. However, there is no work on analyzing the expressive power of K-hop message passing. In this work, we theoretically characterize the expressive power of K-hop message passing. Specifically, we first formally differentiate two different kernels of K-hop message passing which are often misused in previous works. We then characterize the expressive power of K-hop message passing by showing that it is more powerful than 1-WL and can distinguish almost all regular graphs. Despite the higher expressive power, we show that K-hop message passing still cannot distinguish some simple regular graphs and its expressive power is bounded by 3-WL. To further enhance its expressive power, we introduce a KP-GNN framework, which improves K-hop message passing by leveraging the peripheral subgraph information in each hop. We show that KP-GNN can distinguish many distance regular graphs which could not be distinguished by previous distance encoding or 3-WL methods. Experimental results verify the expressive power and effectiveness of KP-GNN. KP-GNN achieves competitive results across all benchmark datasets.
summary: The most popular design paradigm for Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) is 1-hop message passing -- aggregating information from 1-hop neighbors repeatedly. However, the expressive power of 1-hop message passing is bounded by the Weisfeiler-Lehman (1-WL) test. Recently, researchers extended 1-hop message passing to K-hop message passing by aggregating information from K-hop neighbors of nodes simultaneously. However, there is no work on analyzing the expressive power of K-hop message passing. In this work, we theoretically characterize the expressive power of K-hop message passing. Specifically, we first formally differentiate two different kernels of K-hop message passing which are often misused in previous works. We then characterize the expressive power of K-hop message passing by showing that it is more powerful than 1-WL and can distinguish almost all regular graphs. Despite the higher expressive power, we show that K-hop message passing still cannot distinguish some simple regular graphs and its expressive power is bounded by 3-WL. To further enhance its expressive power, we introduce a KP-GNN framework, which improves K-hop message passing by leveraging the peripheral subgraph information in each hop. We show that KP-GNN can distinguish many distance regular graphs which could not be distinguished by previous distance encoding or 3-WL methods. Experimental results verify the expressive power and effectiveness of KP-GNN. KP-GNN achieves competitive results across all benchmark datasets.
abstract_zh: 图神经网络 (GNN) 最流行的设计范例是 1 跳消息传递 - 重复聚合来自 1 跳邻居的信息。然而，1 跳消息传递的表达能力受到 Weisfeiler-Lehman (1-WL) 测试的限制。最近，研究人员通过同时聚合来自节点的 K 跳邻居的信息，将 1 跳消息传递扩展到 K 跳消息传递。然而，还没有分析 K-hop 消息传递的表达能力的工作。在这项工作中，我们从理论上描述了 K 跳消息传递的表达能力。具体来说，我们首先正式区分 K 跳消息传递的两个不同内核，这在以前的工作中经常被误用。然后，我们通过表明 K-hop 消息传递比 1-WL 更强大并且可以区分几乎所有规则图来表征 K-hop 消息传递的表达能力。尽管表达能力较高，但我们表明 K 跳消息传递仍然无法区分一些简单的正则图，并且其表达能力受到 3-WL 的限制。为了进一步增强其表达能力，我们引入了 KP-GNN 框架，该框架通过利用每一跳中的外围子图信息来改进 K 跳消息传递。我们证明 KP-GNN 可以区分许多距离正则图，这是以前的距离编码或 3-WL 方法无法区分的。实验结果验证了KP-GNN的表达能力和有效性。 KP-GNN 在所有基准数据集上都取得了有竞争力的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文分析K-hop消息传递图神经网络的表达能力，提出改进框架KP-GNN以增强其区分能力。
AI.motivation: 现有1-hop消息传递受限于1-WL测试，而K-hop虽被提出但缺乏理论分析，需明确其表达能力边界并改进方法。
AI.method: 区分K-hop核心机制，证明其超越1-WL但受3-WL限制，设计利用跳数周边子图信息的KP-GNN框架。
AI.result: KP-GNN能区分多种距离正则图，实验在基准数据集上表现优异。
AI.conclusion: K-hop表达能力介于1-WL与3-WL之间，KP-GNN通过整合周边信息显著提升模型区分能力。

search_text: How Powerful are K-hop Message Passing Graph Neural Networks K-hop 消息传递图神经网络有多强大 The most popular design paradigm for Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) is 1-hop message passing -- aggregating information from 1-hop neighbors repeatedly. However, the expressive power of 1-hop message passing is bounded by the Weisfeiler-Lehman (1-WL) test. Recently, researchers extended 1-hop message passing to K-hop message passing by aggregating information from K-hop neighbors of nodes simultaneously. However, there is no work on analyzing the expressive power of K-hop message passing. In this work, we theoretically characterize the expressive power of K-hop message passing. Specifically, we first formally differentiate two different kernels of K-hop message passing which are often misused in previous works. We then characterize the expressive power of K-hop message passing by showing that it is more powerful than 1-WL and can distinguish almost all regular graphs. Despite the higher expressive power, we show that K-hop message passing still cannot distinguish some simple regular graphs and its expressive power is bounded by 3-WL. To further enhance its expressive power, we introduce a KP-GNN framework, which improves K-hop message passing by leveraging the peripheral subgraph information in each hop. We show that KP-GNN can distinguish many distance regular graphs which could not be distinguished by previous distance encoding or 3-WL methods. Experimental results verify the expressive power and effectiveness of KP-GNN. KP-GNN achieves competitive results across all benchmark datasets. 图神经网络 (GNN) 最流行的设计范例是 1 跳消息传递 - 重复聚合来自 1 跳邻居的信息。然而，1 跳消息传递的表达能力受到 Weisfeiler-Lehman (1-WL) 测试的限制。最近，研究人员通过同时聚合来自节点的 K 跳邻居的信息，将 1 跳消息传递扩展到 K 跳消息传递。然而，还没有分析 K-hop 消息传递的表达能力的工作。在这项工作中，我们从理论上描述了 K 跳消息传递的表达能力。具体来说，我们首先正式区分 K 跳消息传递的两个不同内核，这在以前的工作中经常被误用。然后，我们通过表明 K-hop 消息传递比 1-WL 更强大并且可以区分几乎所有规则图来表征 K-hop 消息传递的表达能力。尽管表达能力较高，但我们表明 K 跳消息传递仍然无法区分一些简单的正则图，并且其表达能力受到 3-WL 的限制。为了进一步增强其表达能力，我们引入了 KP-GNN 框架，该框架通过利用每一跳中的外围子图信息来改进 K 跳消息传递。我们证明 KP-GNN 可以区分许多距离正则图，这是以前的距离编码或 3-WL 方法无法区分的。实验结果验证了KP-GNN的表达能力和有效性。 KP-GNN 在所有基准数据集上都取得了有竞争力的结果。 本文分析K-hop消息传递图神经网络的表达能力，提出改进框架KP-GNN以增强其区分能力。 Jiarui Feng,Yixin Chen,Fuhai Li,Anindya Sarkar,Muhan Zhang cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Elia Moscoso Thompson,Andrea Ranieri,Silvia Biasotti,Miguel Chicchon,Ivan Sipiran,Minh-Khoi Pham,Thang-Long Nguyen-Ho,Hai-Dang Nguyen,Minh-Triet Tran
title: SHREC 2022: pothole and crack detection in the road pavement using images and RGB-D data
title_zh: SHREC 2022：使用图像和 RGB-D 数据进行道路路面坑洞和裂缝检测
abstract: This paper describes the methods submitted for evaluation to the SHREC 2022 track on pothole and crack detection in the road pavement. A total of 7 different runs for the semantic segmentation of the road surface are compared, 6 from the participants plus a baseline method. All methods exploit Deep Learning techniques and their performance is tested using the same environment (i.e.: a single Jupyter notebook). A training set, composed of 3836 semantic segmentation image/mask pairs and 797 RGB-D video clips collected with the latest depth cameras was made available to the participants. The methods are then evaluated on the 496 image/mask pairs in the validation set, on the 504 pairs in the test set and finally on 8 video clips. The analysis of the results is based on quantitative metrics for image segmentation and qualitative analysis of the video clips. The participation and the results show that the scenario is of great interest and that the use of RGB-D data is still challenging in this context.
summary: This paper describes the methods submitted for evaluation to the SHREC 2022 track on pothole and crack detection in the road pavement. A total of 7 different runs for the semantic segmentation of the road surface are compared, 6 from the participants plus a baseline method. All methods exploit Deep Learning techniques and their performance is tested using the same environment (i.e.: a single Jupyter notebook). A training set, composed of 3836 semantic segmentation image/mask pairs and 797 RGB-D video clips collected with the latest depth cameras was made available to the participants. The methods are then evaluated on the 496 image/mask pairs in the validation set, on the 504 pairs in the test set and finally on 8 video clips. The analysis of the results is based on quantitative metrics for image segmentation and qualitative analysis of the video clips. The participation and the results show that the scenario is of great interest and that the use of RGB-D data is still challenging in this context.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了提交给 SHREC 2022 赛道评估的路面坑洼和裂缝检测方法。总共比较了 7 次不同的路面语义分割运行，其中 6 次来自参与者，外加一个基线方法。所有方法都利用深度学习技术，并且使用相同的环境（即单个 Jupyter 笔记本）测试其性能。向参与者提供了一个训练集，其中包含 3836 个语义分割图像/掩模对和使用最新深度相机收集的 797 个 RGB-D 视频剪辑。然后在验证集中的 496 个图像/掩模对、测试集中的 504 对图像/掩模对以及最后的 8 个视频剪辑上对这些方法进行评估。结果分析基于图像分割的定量指标和视频剪辑的定性分析。参与和结果表明该场景非常有趣，并且在这种情况下使用 RGB-D 数据仍然具有挑战性。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了SHREC 2022比赛中针对道路坑洞和裂缝检测的多种深度学习方法，并通过图像和RGB-D数据进行评估。
AI.motivation: 道路缺陷检测对交通安全至关重要，而RGB-D数据的利用在该领域仍面临挑战，需探索更有效的方法。
AI.method: 比较了7种语义分割方法（含6个参赛方案及基线），基于深度学习技术，在统一Jupyter环境内使用3836组训练图像/掩码及797个RGB-D视频进行训练，并在验证集、测试集及8个视频片段上评估性能。
AI.result: 定量指标与视频定性分析显示，参赛方法在图像分割任务中表现各异，但RGB-D数据的整合仍具挑战性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究场景具有重要应用价值，但需进一步优化RGB-D数据在道路缺陷检测中的使用效果。

authors_text: Yutian Chen,Xingyou Song,Chansoo Lee,Zi Wang,Qiuyi Zhang,David Dohan,Kazuya Kawakami,Greg Kochanski,Arnaud Doucet,Marc'aurelio Ranzato,Sagi Perel,Nando de Freitas
title: Towards Learning Universal Hyperparameter Optimizers with Transformers
title_zh: 使用 Transformer 学习通用超参数优化器
comment: Published as a conference paper in Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS) 2022. Code can be found in https://github.com/google-research/optformer and Google AI Blog can be found in https://ai.googleblog.com/2022/08/optformer-towards-universal.html
comments: Published as a conference paper in Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS) 2022. Code can be found in https://github.com/google-research/optformer and Google AI Blog can be found in https://ai.googleblog.com/2022/08/optformer-towards-universal.html
abstract: Meta-learning hyperparameter optimization (HPO) algorithms from prior experiments is a promising approach to improve optimization efficiency over objective functions from a similar distribution. However, existing methods are restricted to learning from experiments sharing the same set of hyperparameters. In this paper, we introduce the OptFormer, the first text-based Transformer HPO framework that provides a universal end-to-end interface for jointly learning policy and function prediction when trained on vast tuning data from the wild, such as Google's Vizier database, one of the world's largest HPO datasets. Our extensive experiments demonstrate that the OptFormer can simultaneously imitate at least 7 different HPO algorithms, which can be further improved via its function uncertainty estimates. Compared to a Gaussian Process, the OptFormer also learns a robust prior distribution for hyperparameter response functions, and can thereby provide more accurate and better calibrated predictions. This work paves the path to future extensions for training a Transformer-based model as a general HPO optimizer.
summary: Meta-learning hyperparameter optimization (HPO) algorithms from prior experiments is a promising approach to improve optimization efficiency over objective functions from a similar distribution. However, existing methods are restricted to learning from experiments sharing the same set of hyperparameters. In this paper, we introduce the OptFormer, the first text-based Transformer HPO framework that provides a universal end-to-end interface for jointly learning policy and function prediction when trained on vast tuning data from the wild, such as Google's Vizier database, one of the world's largest HPO datasets. Our extensive experiments demonstrate that the OptFormer can simultaneously imitate at least 7 different HPO algorithms, which can be further improved via its function uncertainty estimates. Compared to a Gaussian Process, the OptFormer also learns a robust prior distribution for hyperparameter response functions, and can thereby provide more accurate and better calibrated predictions. This work paves the path to future extensions for training a Transformer-based model as a general HPO optimizer.
abstract_zh: 先前实验中的元学习超参数优化 (HPO) 算法是一种很有前途的方法，可以提高类似分布的目标函数的优化效率。然而，现有的方法仅限于从共享同一组超参数的实验中学习。在本文中，我们介绍了 OptFormer，这是第一个基于文本的 Transformer HPO 框架，它提供了一个通用的端到端接口，用于在使用来自野外的大量调整数据（例如世界上最大的 HPO 数据集之一的 Google Vizier 数据库）进行训练时联合学习策略和功能预测。我们大量的实验表明，OptFormer 可以同时模仿至少 7 种不同的 HPO 算法，并且可以通过其函数不确定性估计进一步改进。与高斯过程相比，OptFormer 还学习超参数响应函数的稳健先验分布，从而可以提供更准确和更好的校准预测。这项工作为未来扩展将基于 Transformer 的模型训练为通用 HPO 优化器铺平了道路。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于Transformer的OptFormer框架，旨在通过大量调参数据学习通用的超参数优化器。
AI.motivation: 现有超参数优化方法受限于相同超参数集的实验，难以适应多样化的优化场景。
AI.method: 设计文本形式的Transformer框架OptFormer，联合学习策略与函数预测，利用如Google Vizier等大规模调参数据进行端到端训练。
AI.result: OptFormer可同时模拟至少7种HPO算法，通过函数不确定性估计进一步提升性能，相比高斯过程提供更准确的预测。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为未来训练基于Transformer的通用HPO优化器奠定了基础。

ai_content.result: OptFormer可同时模拟至少7种HPO算法，通过函数不确定性估计进一步提升性能，相比高斯过程提供更准确的预测。
ai_content.conclusion: 该工作为未来训练基于Transformer的通用HPO优化器奠定了基础。

search_text: Towards Learning Universal Hyperparameter Optimizers with Transformers 使用 Transformer 学习通用超参数优化器 Meta-learning hyperparameter optimization (HPO) algorithms from prior experiments is a promising approach to improve optimization efficiency over objective functions from a similar distribution. However, existing methods are restricted to learning from experiments sharing the same set of hyperparameters. In this paper, we introduce the OptFormer, the first text-based Transformer HPO framework that provides a universal end-to-end interface for jointly learning policy and function prediction when trained on vast tuning data from the wild, such as Google's Vizier database, one of the world's largest HPO datasets. Our extensive experiments demonstrate that the OptFormer can simultaneously imitate at least 7 different HPO algorithms, which can be further improved via its function uncertainty estimates. Compared to a Gaussian Process, the OptFormer also learns a robust prior distribution for hyperparameter response functions, and can thereby provide more accurate and better calibrated predictions. This work paves the path to future extensions for training a Transformer-based model as a general HPO optimizer. 先前实验中的元学习超参数优化 (HPO) 算法是一种很有前途的方法，可以提高类似分布的目标函数的优化效率。然而，现有的方法仅限于从共享同一组超参数的实验中学习。在本文中，我们介绍了 OptFormer，这是第一个基于文本的 Transformer HPO 框架，它提供了一个通用的端到端接口，用于在使用来自野外的大量调整数据（例如世界上最大的 HPO 数据集之一的 Google Vizier 数据库）进行训练时联合学习策略和功能预测。我们大量的实验表明，OptFormer 可以同时模仿至少 7 种不同的 HPO 算法，并且可以通过其函数不确定性估计进一步改进。与高斯过程相比，OptFormer 还学习超参数响应函数的稳健先验分布，从而可以提供更准确和更好的校准预测。这项工作为未来扩展将基于 Transformer 的模型训练为通用 HPO 优化器铺平了道路。 本文提出基于Transformer的OptFormer框架，旨在通过大量调参数据学习通用的超参数优化器。 Yutian Chen,Xingyou Song,Chansoo Lee,Zi Wang,Qiuyi Zhang,David Dohan,Kazuya Kawakami,Greg Kochanski,Arnaud Doucet,Marc'aurelio Ranzato,Sagi Perel,Nando de Freitas cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML
